1.1: Mataanoe tunne Anahatana ihaye tau tuniai reini pusiki.
1.2: Tuniai rei remono wae rewae-wae. Putie hae, putie hae nitae tuniai tewa. Anahatana Ne Inaha ihasa-hasa pusu waene hahae.
1.3: Anahatana iaisosi tuniai wan repumonoi. Iahata, “Manahane!” Oyo manahane.
1.4: Inoo tau rei iake. Reiso inea manahane rei rerihoni pumono.
1.5: Oyo ihete manahane rei tau “Manahane.” Ihete mono rei tau “Pumono.” Nene pumono rei reniku oyo omnanoe. Areimo onone wani mataanoe.
1.6: -7 Nta iasau osi waene rei, “Asamaya tau ua, asuka suru roe, asuka suru poe.” Reiso rasuka rapusu Anahatana iasau rei.
1.8: Ihete waena uare tihue rei tau “Nante.” Nene onone rei reniku oyo omnanoe. Areimo onona ua nea.
1.9: Nta iahata, “Waene wapo nante nohue amanoua tau osa na noo tuamane.” Reiso reuna sani Anahatana iasau rei.
1.10: Ihete tuamane rei nanae tau “Ria muni.” Ihete waene wan remanoui rei tau “Nuae.” Inoo tau rei iake.
1.11: -12 Nta iahata, “Ria muni mo, atuhu waron nita-nitaya oruhu. Oruhu roe, na omi panesi. Atuhu waron nene huaya kania. Aiu waron nene huaya kania.” Oyo raruhu sani Anahatana iaisosi rei. Inoo tau rei iake.
1.13: Nene onone rei reniku oyo omnanoe. Areimo onona tonu nea.
1.14: Ita iahata, “Wan osita roe nante, ohoka. Wan osita tau manahane, wan osita tau pumono. Osita na oautuu onona, hunana, umetena. Oautuu musum ihata, musum runna.
1.15: Osita tuniai.” Oyo rasita sani Anahatana iasau rei.
1.16: -18 Reiso ihaye tau ranie na resita tau manahane, hunane na resita tau pumono. Oneu iae, rasita tau mono. Iautue ranie, hunane, runa oneu na rasita tuniai. Rasita oyo inoo tau rei iake.
1.19: Nene onone rei reniku oyo omnanoe. Areimo onona ate nea.
1.20: Ita iahata, “Poe waene nosite, poe nuae nosite, ikaya, nunu, runa pusire uture ohoka. Roe nante, manua orihu.”
1.21: Ita iahata, “Poe waene nosite, poe nuae nosite, ikaya, nunu, runa pusire uture ohoka. Roe nante manua orihu.” Inoo tau rei iake.
1.22: Irui iake osi ikaya, manua pusire iahata, “Osusu haha na ouna nuae, waene, runa nante nohue reini taua.”
1.23: Nene onone rei ereniku oyo omnanoe. Areimo onona nima nea.
1.24: Ita iahata, “Tuamane ahoka binatang ria muni waron hikina mainaya pusire uture.” Oyo rahoka.
1.25: Reiso Anahatana iuna binatang pusire oyo inoo tau rei iake.
1.26: Ita iahata, “Mai na ita ihaye tau mansiau pusu ita nitari. Mka sio no kawasa tau ikaya, manua, runa binatang ria muni pusire uture.”
1.27: Reiso Anahatana ihaye tau mansia nitao sani ia ruai. Ihaye tau ia pina runa ia hanaie.
1.28: Reiso irui iake osiso iahata, “Osusu haha panesi na orue tau tuniai reini pusiki. Omi mo kawasa tanui. Omi mo kawasa tau ikaya nau nuae, manua roe nante, runa binatang ria muni pusire uture.
1.29: Urui atuhu pusire uture waron nene kania, nene huaya tau me muaine.
1.30: Ne osi binatang runa manua pusire uture urui monota runa aiu waron nene totua tau nene muaina.” Oyo rapusu ia iasau rei.
1.31: Inoo pusire uture waron ihaye tanure rei iake mainae. Nene onone rei ereniku oyo omnanoe. Areimo onona nome nea.

2.1: Reiso Anahatana ihaye tau tuniai reini pusiki.
2.2: Nene onona nome rai ihaye tau pusire oyo nene onona itu mo, iaranahai nea, na pene ipakarian.
2.3: Rania hataya rotu-tu mai nene onona itu rai mo, monne. Anahatana irui iake tau onone wan iamuira Anahatana. Tea mo, ranie hatae rei Anahatana ruai iaranahai. Ihaye tau tuniai reini pusi oyo iaranahai. Anahatana ihaye tau nisi osi mansiau
2.4: Areini sahoro sou monae rerihoni Yahweh Anahatana ihaye tau tuniai reini pusiki. Ihaye tau tuniai reini pusiki mo,
2.5: aiu raruhu mai tuniai reini tewasi, atuhu iae raruhu sui nisiu tewasi. Tea mo, Yahweh Anahatana irati uane tewasi. Ihaye tau mansia na orahuso tewasi.
2.6: Hasae wae huhuna rania reiso rauna tuamana hahaya rampeta pusire.
2.7: Taa san rei, oyo Yahweh Anahatana inana tuamane mkane samatoro iposoi na nanie reuna mansia. Iposoi pusi oyo, iauhona ne nusete osiki na ikarihuru iamahai. Iauhona ne nusete pusu okoi, oyo ia mansia rei iamahaiki.
2.8: Ita iuna nisi iake ria ranie matae eresaa ria otoe Eden. Iunai pusi, oyo iautue ia mansia rei ria nisi rei.
2.9: Oyo iuna aiu waron inoore iaka raruhu ria nisi rei. Aiu waron nene huaya iaire mo, iake. Ria nisi tihue rei aiu ua honu raruhu oi. Ai isa, nene huaya rauna mansiau okarihuru oamahai. Ai isa honu, nene huaya rauna mansiau oanei sae sahoro no hali iake, sae sahoro no hali kahatene.
2.10: Waene isa renia pusu Eden. Rempeta nisi rei. Renia rotu-tu rehokai nau mui, oyo resamai tau sanana ate.
2.11: -12 Waene sanae wani mataanoe nanae Pison. Renia rehori tuama Hawila. Pan rei, osupu hunahane isie wani iake tunne runa kama hau rihue. Osupu hatu waron ita-itana oi.
2.13: Waene sanae isa honu nanae Gihon. Erenia erehori tuama Kus.
2.14: Waene sanae isa honu nanae Tigris. Erenia pan Asyur napi ranie matae eresaa. Sanane isa honu nanae Efrat.
2.15: Reiso Yahweh Anahatana iautue ia mansia wain iposoi arihoni tuamane rei na isaka nisi rei na irahui.
2.16: Yahweh Anahatana iasau osi ia mansia rei. Iahata, “Utapia aai ai huae sae man mai nisi anoe reini.
2.17: Hasae ai wani nene huaya rauna mansiau oanei sae sahoro no hali iake, sae sahoro no hali kahatene mo, pene aiki. Tea mo, sani aiki ranie hatae reini oyo, mka amataya rei sirinia.”
2.18: Oyo Yahweh Anahatana iasau pan anoi. Iahata, “Ia mansia reini mo, ruai man mka iake tewa. Kahurae au una ne neta isa wain pannuhu runai na iakahaiki oi.”
2.19: Reiso inana tuamane mkane samatoro iposo tuamane rei samatoro iunai tau binatang pusire uture runa manua pusire uture. Iposoi samatoro irorire osi ia manisa rei nanie inoore. Inoore na ihete nanaya.
2.20: Arai sahoro ia mansia rei isima runa binatang runa manua pusire nene nanaya sakakau. Ne binatang rai pusire uture pannuhu runa ia mansia rei tewa. Pannuhu runai tewa na ioi ne neta tanui na iakahaiki tewa.
2.21: Reiso Yahweh Anahatana iuna ia mansia hanaie rei inekei munui. Inekei munui oyo, ihoka nusui anae isa. Ihokai samatoro isou nusui anae nahae rei tau ne henate.
2.22: Nusui anae rei, iunai tau ia pina isa oyo iroriki osi ia hanaie rei.
2.23: Oyo ia mansia rei iasau iahata, “Ira oe! Ia rei sahoro unina-ninai reini tea! Ia sahoro pannuhu runa au. Ne unia arihoni au we unia. Ne henate arihoni au we henate. Reiso uhete nanai tau ia pina. Tea mo, Anahatana inanai arihoni au hanaie.”
2.24: Ia pina pannuhu runa ia hanaie reiso, sio hanaia oeu oarihoni no mansia mainaya na orue okata no pinau. Nooso sani sio tumata osa man.
2.25: Ia pina rei runa ia hanaie rei sanakuso ne oaumaa tewa.

3.1: Yahweh Anahatana ihaye tau binatang pusire. Pusire mo iaka. Hasae tekene sahoro ianei panesi, ne iakarota. Tekene rei iasei arihoni ia pina rei, “Titue si? Anahatana isopo iahata, ‘Pene oai ai huae sae man wan nisi anoe reini?’ ”
3.2: Iahata, “Ami ai ai huaya pusire iake.
3.3: Ne hasae ai isa wani reooi paka nisi tihue mo, aiki tewa. Tea mo, Anahatana isopo. Akahuui man iae, tewa oi. Tea mo, sani aiki te akahuui, mka amatama.”
3.4: Iahata, “Hmm. Iakarotamo. Ne titue tewa. Omi mka omatamo tewa.
3.5: Anahatana iasau san rei tau ianei ata mka oai ai huae rei, oyo onoo hainau. Mka omi sani Anahatana. Omi sani Anahatana reiso, oanei sae sahoro mo hali iaka sae sahoro mo hali kahatena.”
3.6: Ia pina rei inoo ai huae rei, inooi marainie, reiso iahata iaiki iae mka iahanai iake. Iasau pan anoi iahata, “Nene iake mo, au uanei panesi.” Reiso ikure ai huae rei oyo iaiki. Iaiki samatoro iruiki osi sahai. Reiso sahai iae iaiki oi.
3.7: Uaso oaiki suka, oyo onoo hainau. Oanei ata sanakuso. Reiso uaso onana ai ara totua samatoro ohonire. Ohonire oyo oateire. Osou nete no patana.
3.8: Reiso nene ranie hatae rei tau ranie remanu, oatinu Yahweh Anahatana kinakai pan nisi rei. Reiso uaso oauhuniso sui ai aikuna. Oauhuniso na pene inooso.
3.9: Ne ioi ia hanaie rei. Iahata, “Ano. Ano wani sui supa?”
3.10: Iahata, “Upu. Uatinu kinakam mai nisi reini so, uauhuniku. Ukaitaua. Tea mo, tenennta.”
3.11: Iahata, “Ia seia isima ata sanakua rei? Ano aai ai huae wani usopoa rei te sae rei?”
3.12: Iahata, “Ia pina wain ano aruiki osiku na ikataku rei, sahoro iruiki osiku. Iruiki oyo uaiki.”
3.13: Ita iasei arihoni ia pina rei. “Amuna na auna me hali rei?” Iahata, “Tekene rei sahoro iakarotaku. Reiso uai ai huae rei tea.”
3.14: Reiso Yahweh Anahatana iasau osi tekene rei san rei. Iahata, “Ano me hali rei, reiso mka uapasanaya. Arihoni binatang pusire hasae ano sahoro urui kahatene osia. Urui kahatene osia rei, ranie hatae reini ro-rotu-tu ria supan ausu tau tiam pokone. Mka ausua pusu tapune hahae ria ro-rotu-tu amataya.
3.15: Ano runa ia pina rei, uamo mka ouna nisa na umau. Ano mea upu momou na ia nea upu momou ohiti nisa na umau. Ano mka arutu upui toui. Ne ia mo, mka iheta poho unumu.”
3.16: Ita iasau osi ia pina rei. Iahata, “Tinaim taua, au mka una resunia. Ia ikine iamrai, au mka una tiam reun mainae. Ne masike tiam ereun san rei iae, anom reoto runa saham sirinia. Masike resunia iae atinu tanui sirinia.”
3.17: Ita iasau osi ia hanaie rei. Iahata, “Ano atinu tau saham, reiso aai ai huae rei wani au usopo unete na pene aiki. Ano apusui reiso uapasanaya. Urui kahatene osi tuamane. Reiso kahurae apakarian eresuni-sunia rotu-tu amataya. Apakarian akahi-kahia samatoro tuamane rei ereuna me atuhu isia iaka tau me muaina.
3.18: Akahi-kahia tau monota runa awaneu monota waron nene unia. Mka ai utana waron orahure tewa.
3.19: Ne masike ai utana waron orahure tewa iae, mka apakarian mainae tau ruam me kausa wanaya na arahu tuamane reini na asupu me muaina. Me kausa wanaya rotu-tu amataya na ruam auna tuamane honu. Mataanoe uposoa arihoni tuamane, reiso anunia auna tuamane honu.”
3.20: Ia mansia mataanoe rei nanai Adam. Ihete sahai nanai Hawa. Ia pina rei iuna ina tau sio mansiau pusiso, reiso nanai Hawa. Hawa nene nohue, “Iapuhai.”
3.21: Reiso Yahweh Anahatana iuna apia arihoni binatang unte, samatoro iausahure osi Adam runa sahai uaso.
3.22: Yahweh Anahatana iahata, “Muie reini mansia nooi sani ita nea. Ianei sae sahoro no hali iaka runa sae sahoro no hali kahatena. Reiso kahurae inetei na pene iai ai huae wani ereuna okarihuru oamahai. Inetei na pene iamahaiki rotu-tu ria supan.”
3.23: Reiso inei ia mansia rei uaso arihoni Nisi Eden rei. Iaisosiki irahu tau tuamane wani iposoi arihoniki rei.
3.24: Ineiso samatoro iaisosi sio mamsakaya on roe noiyaha osaka nisi rei, napi on ria ranie mata eresaa. Osaka nene mitanunue. Oyo iautue tunue wani ereita-itai. Tunue rei resawai eretope erenete mitanunue rei. Tunue rei runa sio mamsakaya rai nanie osaka arena wani ereeui nau ai wani nene huae ereuna mansia okarihuru oamahai. Reiso iuna san rei na pene ia seia oi ieu haineke ai rei.

4.1: Adam inekei ikata sahai Hawa oyo tinain taua. Anai iamrai, ia hanaie. Iamrai poe, Hawa iahata, “Yahweh iakahaiku reiso ususu we ia iki hanaie.” Reiso ihete nanai tau Kain. Nene nohue, “Ususu.”
4.2: Ita ia iki muie isa iamrai honu. Nanai Habel. Uaso sio mainaya, oyo Kain isaka irahu nisi. Ne Habel mo, isaka rompau runa une-uneu.
4.3: Ereeu mai, taue isa Kain inana atuhu oyo iruire osi Yahweh.
4.4: Habel iae san rei oi. Ne ia mo, irui rompau. Rompau anaya manonta. Irui nene minaya. Reiso Yahweh ikaumin runa Habel irui rompau nene minaya rai.
4.5: Ne Kain mo, ipenei iatarimai runa ne atuhu rai. Reiso Kain anoi resaa hun ruai rotu-tu uai anoe remtukui.
4.6: Reiso Yahweh iasau osi Kain. Iahata, “Amuna na anom resaa rei? Na uam anoe remtukui rei?
4.7: Sani auna iake, mka uam anoi kaie. Mka anoku iake runaya. Ne sani auna kahatene mo, ainati. Rosa wani rekaohua haineke nea. Ano nanie apalalosa. Ne kahurae apamese anom.”
4.8: Nene taue isa Kain iasau osi wanin san rei. Iahata, “Mai, na uata ieuta na ria nisi.” Hokaso ria nisi, oyo Kain ihunu wanin.
4.9: Reiso Yahweh iasei tau Kain, “Wanim Habel wainpa?” Iahata, “Mpanei. Ia seia ianeiki? Au usaka waniku?”
4.10: Iahata, “Amuna na auna kahatene san rei? Wanim ne nasin wani reasei nea.
4.11: Au nanie urui kahatene osia, reiso wan uneia arihoni tuamane reini. Tuamane wani reninu wanim ne nasin rei. Tau ahunu wanim, tuamane rei reninu ne nasin. Reiso nanie uapasanaya.
4.12: Sani nanie arahua, mka atuhu isia tewa. Mka aeu ahori-horia asupu naniam manisate isa tewa mai tuniai reini.”
4.13: Iahata, “Upu. Ira oe! Mka umataku tea! Apasanaku mainae san rei mana mo, ukua tewa!
4.14: Aneiku arihoni tuamane reini. Aneiku arihoni uam anoe. Mka uhori-horiku, usupu naniaku mai tuniai reini tewa. Reiso sani ia isa isupuku mka ihunuku.”
4.15: Iahata, “Tewa. Sani ia isa ihunua, mka ia rei, uapasanai mainae rotu-tu nai itu.” Oyo Yahweh iakakinai na sio umau osupui pene ohunui.
4.16: Oyo ieui iarihoni Yahweh uai anoe. Iruei pan tuama Nod pan napi ranie mata resaa, pan Eden on pan hae. Kain nea upu nea momou
4.17: Kain iausahai, oyo sahai uaso osusu no ia iki hanaie isa nanai Henokh. Iamrai poe, Kain wain iapuoo niane isa reiso ihete niane nanae tau Henokh erepusu anai hanaie.
4.18: Ita Henokh iausahai, isusu anai hanaie isa wain nanai Irad. Ita Irad iausahai, isusu anai hanaie wain nanai Mehuyael. Ita Mehuyael iausahai, isusu anai hanaie wain nanai Metusael. Ita Metusael iausahai, isusu anai hanaie wain nanai Lamekh.
4.19: Lamekh inana ne pinau ua. Ia isa nanai Ada. Ia isa honu nanai Sila.
4.20: Ada isusu Yabal. Ia sahoro nea upu nea momou oapiara makapanau. Orueso tau numau waron onanare arihoni makapana unta.
4.21: Yabal wanin nanai Yubal. Ia sahoro nea upu momou oaise sae isa wani nooi sani gitar runa oauhona suling.
4.22: Lamekh sahai muie Sila isusu Tubal-Kain. Ia sahoro nea upu momou otuka alatiu arihoni tampaka runa mamono. Tubal-Kain hotai nanai Naama.
4.23: Lamekh iasau osi ne pinau uaso, irui ruai roe uae. Iahata, “Ada runa Sila uamo. Saka ono-noo au. Sani ia honue isa nanie ihitaku mo, mka uhunui.
4.24: Sani ia isa ihunu Kain, Anahatana iapasanai mainae nai itu. Mka sani ia isa ihunu au mo, Anahatana iapasanai mainae nai osa, nai hutu itu rahana itu.” Set iamrai
4.25: Adam inekei ikata sahai honu. Oyo isusu anai hanaie isa honu. Anai hanaie rei nanai Set. Inai iahata, “Anahatana irui anaku hanaie isa honu ikati Habel wain kakai ihunui.” Set nene nohue, “Irui.”
4.26: Set iausahai oyo isusu anai hanaie isa nanai Enos. Tau muie rei samatoro mansiau oainisi oainaa na Yahweh.

5.1: Areini sahoro Adam nea upu momou nanao. Mataanoe Anahatana ihaye tau mansiau. Ia mansia rei iroma ruai nitai.
5.2: Ihaye tau mansia mo, ia pina runa ia hanaie. Irui iake osiso. Ioiso tau mansiau.
5.3: Adam iruei rotu-tu ne musum 130. Ita isusu anai hanaie isa honu. Nooi sani ia ruai. Ihete nanai tau Set.
5.4: Adam ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 800 honu, isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
5.5: Rotu-tu iruei ne musum 930 samatoro imatai.
5.6: Tau Set ne musum 105 isusu anai hanaie isa nanai Enos.
5.7: Set ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 807 honu, isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
5.8: Rotu-tu iruei ne musum 912 samatoro imatai.
5.9: Tau Enos ne musum 90 isusu anai hanaie isa nanai Kenan.
5.10: Enos ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 815 honu, isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
5.11: Rotu-tu iruei ne musum 905 samatoro imatai.
5.12: Tau Kenan ne musum 70 isusu anai hanaie isa nanai Mahalaleel.
5.13: Kenan ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 840 honu, isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
5.14: Rotu-tu iruei ne musum 910 samatoro imatai.
5.15: Tau Mahalaleel ne musum 65 isusu anai hanaie isa nanai Yared.
5.16: Mahalaleel ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 830 honu, isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
5.17: Rotu-tu iruei ne musum 895 samatoro imatai.
5.18: Tau Yared ne musum 162 isusu anai hanaie isa nanai Henokh.
5.19: Yared ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 800 honu, isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
5.20: Rotu-tu iruei ne musum 962 samatoro imatai.
5.21: Tau Henokh ne musum 65 isusu anai hanaie isa nanai Metusalah.
5.22: Henokh ikarihuru iamahai anoi osa runa Anahatana rotu-tu musum 300 honu, isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
5.24: Henokh anoi osa runa Anahatana sui osa reiso, Anahatana iapusaai. Sira tau tutui tewa nea.
5.25: Tau Metusalah ne musum 187 isusu anai hanaie isa nanai Lamekh.
5.26: Metusalah ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 782 honu, isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
5.27: Rotu-tu iruei ne musum 969 samatoro imatai.
5.28: Tau Lamekh ne musum 182 isusu anai hanaie isa.
5.29: Iahata, “Ia ikine rei mka irui karahirine osita tau irahuta mai tuamane wan Yahweh irui kahatene tanui.” Reiso Lamekh ihete nanai tau Nuh. Nuh nene nohue, “Karahirine.”
5.30: Lamekh ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 595 honu, isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
5.31: Rotu-tu iruei ne musum 777 oyo imatai.
5.32: Nuh ne musum 500, oyo isusu ne hehuka hanaia tonu. Ia manaonete nanai Sem, ia autihue nanai Yafet, ia muie nanai Ham.

6.1: Sio mansiau osusu haha, reiso orue ohori pusi tuniai reini. Reiso osusu no sio iki pinau panesi.
6.2: Sio on roe noiyaha onoo sio pina hehuka rei, sio iaka. Reiso onana sio pina hehuka wason okaumin runaso rei.
6.3: Yahweh inoo ata sio mansiau no kahatena panesi reiso iahata, “Mka utapi sio mansiau oamahaiso rotu-tu ria supan tewa tau sio opalalosa panesi. Utapiso rotu-tu orue rotu-tu musum utun hutu ua nesi tewa. Kahurae pannuhu musum san rei oyo omataso.”
6.4: Tau napisi rei runa ereeu sio mansiau, sio noa-noaya mai tuniai reini. Sio reini sahoro rerihoni sio pina hehuka wason onana sio on roe noiyaha rei. Sio noa-noaya rei mo, sio panesi oationaso tau no kawasa mainae tau napisi reini.
6.5: Yahweh inoo sio mai tuniai no kahatena panesi. Hasae anoo ranoo kahatena man.
6.6: Iatamisi ata ihaye tau mansiau mai tuniai reini nea. Iahana iake pan anoi tewa.
6.7: Reiso iahata, “Uatamisi ata uhaye tau mansiau runa manua, binatang pusire uture reiso mka uhunu pusiso.”
6.8: Ne Nuh mo, iuna Yahweh anoi iake. Anahatana iaisosi Nuh inana kapane
6.9: Areini sou monae rerihoni Nuh. Nuh anoi manisate. Rerihoni ia ne naene ia sahoro sio mka oasau tewa ata ne isanae. Tea mo, ia ne isanae isa tewa. Anoi osa runa Anahatana.
6.10: Isusu ne hehuka hanaia tonu. Ia manaonete nanai Sem, ia autihue nanai Yafet, runa ia muie nanai Ham.
6.11: Ne Anahatana inoo sui supan man sio tamena mai tuniai reini ouna kahatena. Oturuhaka, oakakapa.
6.12: Anahatana inoo mai tuniai reini mo, hasae inoo kahatena ruae man.
6.13: Reiso iasau osi Nuh. Iahata, “Uapamata sou nea. Nanie uhunu sio mansiau runa binatang pusire uture. Tuniai reini taue runa sio no kahatena rai. Reiso nanie uhunu pusire uture. Nanie uapumoko tuniai reini.
6.14: Reiso atuka me kapane isa arihoni ai gopir wani makae. Auna nene kakaranaya panesi pan anoe. Apunu aspal mai mui runa pan anoe.
6.15: Kapane rei kahurae nene naue meteri 133, hekani meteri 22, naue suru roe meteri 13.
6.16: Ainata me kapane rei. Arenu kasunepene hahae ereeu roe ainataya na karate senti 44. Atuka kapane rei, nene napisi tonu. Atuka nene mitanunue isa mai nusue.
6.17: Mka au una waene eresaa rotu-tu eresau-sau tuamane pusiki. Waene eresau-sau tuamane na erehunu pusi mansiau, manua, binatang pusire uture. Mka ramata pusiso.
6.18: Ne ano mo, mka utotoe runaya. Anusua pan kapane anoe rei akata saham, me hehuka runa no pinau pusiso.
6.19: Rerihoni manua nitaya pusire, arori manu inae isa runa manu hanaie isa. Rerihoni binatang pusire, arori binatang inae isa runa binatang hanaie isa.
6.20: Mka pusire uture rahokaso mai tanua na arorire pan kapane anoe na ramahaiso.
6.21: Arori muaina nitaya pusire na osi ruamo runa binatang runa manua rai pusire uture.”
6.22: Nuh inana pusire pusu Anahatana iasau osiki rei.

7.1: Yahweh iasau osi Nuh, iahata, “Hasae ano sahoro atinu tanuku. Hasae ano sahoro anom manisate. Ne sio pusiso mai tuniai reini oatinu tanuku tewa. Reiso anusua pan kapane anoe. Anusua akata saham, me hehuka tonso runa no pinau.
7.2: Rerihoni binatang nitaya pusire uture waron oaire iake oakanupure osiku iake, arori pina runa hanaie unua itu. Ne rerihoni waron oamaonre mo, arori unue osa man.
7.3: Rerihoni manua nitaya pusire uture waron oaire iake, oakanupure osiku iake arori unua itu oi. Ne rerihoni waron oamaonre mo, arori unue osa man. Arorire pan kapane anoe na ramahaiso.
7.4: Nesie itu rei, una uane mainae rotu-tu onona hutu ate. Au mka uhunu pusi mansiau runa binatang waron uhaye tau pusire rei.”
7.5: Reiso Nuh iuna sae waron Yahweh iasau osiki rei.
7.6: Waene eresaa mai tuniai reini mo, Nuh ne musum utun nome.
7.7: Nuh runa sahai, ne hehuka tonso, runa no pinau onususo pan kapane anoe rei. Onususo na pene omokoso tau waene eresaa rei.
7.8: -9 Manua runa binatang nitaya pusire uture ranusu pusire rakata Nuh sio. Ranusu unue erepusu unue. Waroni oaire iake, oakanupure osi Anahatana iake runa waron oamaonre. Ranusu pusu Anahatana iasau rei.
7.10: Ereruma onona itu nau oyo, waene eresaa. Eresou tuniai reini pusiki.
7.11: Nuh ne musum utun nome pannuhu hunana ua umetene wani onona hutusa rahana itu. Oyo wae huhuna rasaa pusire mai tuniai reini. Sira tau waene erenia eresaa suru ria suru nau noo sani waene sanane. On roe nante mo, sira tau waene erenia san rei oi. Noo sani sio ohuka mitanunue wani erenete waene roe nante.
7.13: Tau ranie hatae rei Nuh sio pusiso onususo pan kapane rei anoe.
7.14: -15 Binatang runa manua pusire uture ranusu oi
7.16: sani Anahatana iasau rei. Onusu pusiso san rei oyo, Yahweh iraru kapane rei nene mitanunue.
7.17: -18 Waene eresaa rei rotu-tu onona hutu ate. Waene eresaa mainae reiso kapane rei remamanui.
7.19: Waene eresaa rotu-tu noo mosa tinetaya tewa nea. Masike tinetaya waron mainaya nai osa iae, noo mosa nene hahaya tewa nea.
7.20: Waene eresaa sui osa reiso ereniku tinetaya waron mainaya rotu-tu meter itu.
7.21: -23 Anahatana ihunu pusire waron rakarihuru ramahai mai tuniai reini. Ihunu mansia, manua, binatang pusire uture. Wason ihunso tewa mo, hasae Nuh runa pusire waron ikatare pan kapane anoe rei.
7.24: Waene rei erekaisunu tewa rotu-tu onona utun hutu nima.

8.1: Anahatana anoi kanihue runa Nuh tewa. Anoi kanihue runa binatang waron rakatai pan kapane anoe rei tewa. Reiso iuna ihute reuhona pusu tuniai reini. Iuna ihute reuhona na waene erekaisunu.
8.2: Inete wae huhuna hunaya poe tuamane. Inete waena pusire roe nante. Uane ereminai
8.3: oyo waene erekai-kaisunu. Waene erekaisunu rotu-tu onona utun hutu nima oimo, waene nekete mkane nea.
8.4: Tau hunana itu onona hutusa rahana itu kapane rei erekokiee. Erekokiee roe tinetae hahae pan tinetaya Ararat.
8.5: Waene erekaisunu sui osa rotu-tu hunana hutusa onone osa, oyo noo mosa tinetaya hahaya nea. Rahotuso nea.
8.6: Ereeu rotu-tu onona hutu ate samatoro Nuh ihuka kapane rei nene sasamata.
8.7: Ihukai nanie ihoka manu gagak. Ihoka manue rei, ne erenuniki mai kapane tewa nea. Ne ererihu suru ria suru nau sui osa rotu-tu waene rei erekaimeniki nai osa.
8.8: Ita Nuh ihoka manu puane, nanie ianei ata kani waene erekaimeniki nea te tewasi.
8.9: Ne waene eresou pusi tuniai reini pusiki reiso manue rei eresupu naniae na retasohoi tewa. Eresupu naniae tewa reiso erenuniki mai kapane rei honu. Erenuniki oyo Nuh iasasona hanai na inotai. Inotai samatoro inusu iroriki mai kapane anoe rei.
8.10: Inapa rotu-tu onona itu honu, ita ihoka manue rei honu. Ihokai oyo ialapasiki honu.
8.11: Tau nene ranie manne manue rei erenuniki mai Nuh honu. Erenuniki ererori ai saitun totue isa wani matae asi. Ereroriki tau hohae. Tau rei samatoro Nuh ianei ata waene erekaimeniki nea.
8.12: Ita inapa rotu-tu onona itu honu. Ita ialapasi manue rei honu. Ialapasiki rei oimo, erenuni mai tanui tewa nea.
8.13: Nuh ne musum utun nome nesi osa, tau hunane osa, onone osa samatoro waene erekaimeniki ia-ia, Nuh ihuka kapane rei nene ainatae isa oyo inoo sui tihue rei. Ne inoo tihue rei erekaimeniki nea.
8.14: Tau hunana ua onona hutu ua rahana itu tuniai mo, erekaimeniki nai osa nea.
8.16: Iahata, “Ahokaya arihoni kapane rei runa saham na me hehuka na no pinau.
8.17: Ohoka orori manua runa binatang pusire uture. Ohokare na rasusu haha mai tuniai reini.”
8.18: Reiso Nuh sio ohokaso arihoni kapane anoe rei.
8.19: Manua runa binatang pusire rahokaso arihoni kapane rei. Rahokaso sakakau. Manu inae erekata manu hanaie. Une-une inae erekata une-une hanaie oi.
8.20: Nuh sio ohokaso oyo irane hatu noore sani anau. Iranere nanie iainisi iainaa runa Yahweh. Oyo inana manu hatae isa runa binatang hatae isa rerihoni manua runa binatang pusire waron iaire iake, iakanupure osi Anahatana iake. Inanare oyo iakanupure roe hatu hahaya rai.
8.21: Iakanupure oyo Yahweh anoi iake runa hau rihue rei. Reiso iahata, “Au mka urui kahatene osi sio mansiau pusu no kahatena rai tewa nea. Uanei ata on sio honua mo, anoo ranoa kahatena. Au mka uhunu mansiau runa binatang wason okarihuru oamahai sani mato una osiso rei tewa nea.
8.22: Mka musum mamrahue runa mapahia nisi sui osa. Musum mahatane musum titie sui osa. Ihate runa runne sui osa. Pumono runa manahane sui osa rotu-tu tuniai reini erepena.”

9.1: Anahatana irui iake osi Nuh runa ne hehuka. Iahata, “Asusu haha na moa upu momou panesi. Mka moa upu momou orue sui tuniai reini pusiki.
9.2: Manua, ikaya runa binatang pusire uture, mka omi mo kawasa tau pusire. Mka rakaitaumo.
9.3: Rai pusire tau mo muaina sani ai huaya ai totua pusire. Rai pusire uruire osimo tau mo muaina.
9.4: Hasae usopo na pene oai henate wani nasie asi. Tea mo, inaha mo, wamo nasi rei.
9.5: Sio mansiau runa binatang wason ohunu mansia mo, kahurae oapasanai. Mka uhunui oi.
9.6: Tea mo, uhaye tau mansia pusu nitaku. Reiso ia seia ihunu mansia mo, mka mansia ihunui oi.
9.7: Ne omi mo, osusu haha na moa upu momou orue sui tuniai reini pusiki.
9.8: -9 Atinu. Au nanie utotoe osimo runa moa upu momou.
9.10: Nanie utotoe runa manua runa binatang pusire uture waron rakatamo pan kapane anoe rei.
9.11: Nanie utotoe san rei: Utotoe na uhunu omi mansiau runa binatang pusire uture pusu waene eresaa sani mato-mato rei tewa nea.
9.12: Nanie urui kakinate osimo. Kakinate na anori rapeka runa sae wani utotoe osimo rei. Utotoe osi omi mansiau runa binatang pusimo utumo. Utotoe rotu-tu ria supan.
9.13: Reiso kakinate rei, mka uautue tihana roe nante na anori rapeka ata utotoe osimo nea.
9.14: Sani onoo onoe oyo mka tihana rei, onooi
9.15: -17 mka anoku repeka runa sae wani utotoe osimo rei. Reiso mka waene eresaa erehunu pusimo utumo san rei tewa nea.” Nuh runa ne Hehuka
9.18: Nuh ne hehuka wason osipuso arihoni kapane rei mo: Sem, Yafet, runa Ham. Ham mo, ia Kanaan amai.
9.19: Nuh ne hehuka tonu rei sahoro ouna numa upua tau sio pusiso mai tuniai reini.
9.20: Nuh mo, ia mamrahu nisi. Ia sahoro irahu nisi anggur mataanoe.
9.21: Taue isa Nuh ininu tihu anggur. Reiso imukei. Imukei oyo, inosu pusi ne apia oyo inekei sanakui pan ne numa unte anoe. Ne numa wani sio onanai arihoni makapana unte rei.
9.22: Inekei isanakui oyo Ham inusu pan numa anoe inoo amai isanakui. Reiso ihokai pan mui isima osi nea kakau uaso.
9.23: Uaso oatinu san rei oyo, onana papi naue. Onana papite rei, samatoro uaso oaunutui mai manao. Oyo oeu orike totu onusu pan numa rei. Nanie osou noa ama tau papite rei. Uaso orike totu na pene onoo noa ama wain isanakui rei.
9.24: Imukei suka oyo ianei ata anai hanaie muie ituruhaka iakakapa tanui.
9.25: Oyo iahata, “Masi amataya! Uainisi na Anahatana irui kahatene osi Kanaan! Mka iuna maniane mainae tau nea kakau uaso.
9.26: Uainisi uainaa runa Yahweh Anahatana wain Sem iainisi iainaa runai. Kanaan mka iuna maniane tau Sem.
9.27: Uainisi na Anahatana iuna Yafet isusu haha. Uainisi na nea upu momou orueso okata Sem nea upu momou. Kanaan mka iuna maniane tau Yafet.”
9.28: Waene erekaisunu suka, Nuh ikarihuru iamahai asi rotu-tu musum 350 honu.

10.1: Areini sahoro Nuh ne hehuka nea upu momou nanao. Nuh ne hehuka mo, Sem, Yafet runa Ham. Waene erekaisunu suka, oyo tonso osusu haha no hehuka hanaia. Yafet ne hehuka
10.2: Yafet ne hehuka mo, Gomer, Magog, Madai, Yawan, Tubal, Mesekh runa Tiras.
10.3: Gomer nea upu momou sahoro orueso pan: Askenas, Rifat runa Togarma.
10.4: Yawan nea upu momou sahoro orueso pan: Elisa, Tarsis, nusa Siprus runa Rodes.
10.5: Sio rei sahoro noa upu momou orueso pena nusau. Orueso pena nua nusua. Reiso sio rei pusiso sahoro Yafet nea upu momou. Orueso pena ruao no niana. Pena niana waron no sou sakakau. Ham ne hehuka
10.6: Ham nea upu momou mo, sio Kus, Mesir, Libia runa sio Kanaan.
10.7: Kus nea upu momou mo, sio Seba, Hawila, Sabta, Raema runa sio Sabtekha. Raema nea upu momou mo, sio Syeba runa sio Dedan.
10.8: Kus anai hanaie isa nanai Nimrod. Ia sahoro iahita iake inesi sio pusiso mai tuniai reini.
10.9: Yahweh iakahaiki na iakaohu iake inesi sio pusiso. Reiso sio oasau. Oahata, “Uainisi na Yahweh iunaya akaohu iake sani Nimrod.”
10.10: Mataanoe Nimrod irime Babel, Erekh runa Akad. Kotau tonu rai waropan otoe Babilonia.
10.11: On pan Babilonia ieui na poe otoe Asyur. Hoka poe oyo iapuoo kotau Niniwe, Rehobot-Ir, Kalah
10.12: runa Resen. Resen wani kua Niniwe runa Kalah uare tihue. Kota rei mo, kota mainae.
10.13: Mesir nea upu momou mo, sio Lidia, Anamim, Lehabim, Naftuhim,
10.14: Patrusim, Kasluhim runa sio Kaftorim. Sio Kasluhim noa upu momou tau sio Pilistin.
10.15: Kanaan ne hehuka mo, Sidon, ia manaonete, runa Het, ia muie.
10.16: Kanaan iae nea upu momou tau sio Yebusi, Amori, Girgasi,
10.18: Arwadi, Semari runa sio Hamati. Kanaan nea upu momou rei orue osama-samaso ohainau umau.
10.19: Reiso no tihua rai nene nenena hainau, on pan Sidon ereeu na poe Gerar erehokai haineke Gasa. Hae napi ranie matae eresaa nanie ereeu na ria Sodom, Gomora, Adma runa Seboim, rotu-tu haineke Lasa.
10.20: Sio rei sahoro Ham nea upu momou. Orue sakakau niana, sakakau sou. Sem ne hehuka
10.21: Sem wanin tau Yafet. Sem sahoro nea upu momou sio Ibrani.
10.22: Sem ne hehuka mo, Elam, Asyur, Arpakhsad, Lud runa Aram.
10.23: Aram nea upu momou mo, sio Us, Hul, Geter runa sio Mas.
10.24: Arpakhsad isusu Selah. Selah isusu Eber.
10.25: Eber isusu anai hanaia ua. Ia manaonete nanai Peleg. Tea mo, tau ne naene sio pusiso mai tuniai reini osama-samaso pena niana. Peleg nene nohue, “Osama-samaso”. Ia muie nanai Yoktan.
10.26: Yoktan nea upu momou mo, sio Almodad, Selef, Hasar-Mawet, Yerah,
10.29: Ofir, Hawila runa sio Yobab. Sio rei pusiso sahoro Yoktan nea upu momou.
10.30: No tihue wani orueso tanui reimo hekani on nau Mesa ereeu rotu-tu ria Sefar. Sefar areimo, waria pupua napi ranie matae eresaa.
10.31: Sio rei pusiso, Sem nea upu momou. Orue sakakau otoa, sakakau niana, sakakau sou.
10.32: Sio rei pusiso utuso sahoro Nuh nea upu momou. Niane osa ereeu mai niane osa. Ipane osa ereeu mai ipane osa. Sio rei pusiso utuso sahoro Nuh nea upu momou. Reiso waene eresaa suka, samatoro sio rei pusiso orati sio niana-niana mai tuniai reini pusiki.

11.1: Mataanoe sio niana-niana mai tuniai reini pusiso utuso no sou osa.
11.2: Oeuso rotu-tu ohokaso ria rani mata msaae. Ohokaso ria watane wan hekan. Watane rei nanae Babilonia. Hoka ria oyo orueso ria rei.
11.3: Taue isa oasau osi umau. Oahata, “Mai na inehu tuamane runa monota oyo iamanre na makaya.” Reiso sio ouna hatu nanie oapuoo numa. Oyo onana aspal opunui tau hatu rai na nanie rakina umau.
11.4: Oamanou pusire, ita oasau osi umau honu. Oahata, “Mai na iapuoo kota isa. Kota wani nene numa isa rehokai roe nante. Iapuooi na sio pusiso oatinu nanari na pene isama-samata ineka pusi tuniai reini.”
11.5: Wasoni onanai asi, oyo sira tau Yahweh ikaisunu nanie inoo kota rei. Kota runa nene numa wani sio mansiau oapuooi rotu-tu erehokai roe nante rei.
11.6: Iahata, “Sio reini no niane osa, no sou osa. Areini mo, mato mataanoe. Potu-potuina, mka ouna sae man pusu no maue.
11.7: Reiso mai, na ikaisunu na iuna wena-wena no sou. Iwena-wena no sou na pene oanei umau.”
11.8: Reiso Yahweh iuna wena-wenaso, oneka pusi tuniai reini. Reiso oapuoo kota rei tewa nea.
11.9: Ria kota rei, Yahweh iuna wena-wena no sou, reiso kota rei nanae Babel. Nene nohue, “Wena-wenaso”. Ria kota rei, Yahweh iuna wena-wenaso oneka pusi tuniai reini. Sem nea upu nea momou
11.10: Areini sahoro Sem nea upu momou nanao. Waene erekaisunu musum ua nea, Sem ne musum utun. Ne musum utun samatoro isusu anai hanaie manaonete. Nanai Arpakhsad.
11.11: Isusu Arpakhsad oyo ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 500 honu. Ne isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
11.12: Arpakhsad ne musum 35, isusu anai hanaie manaonete nanai Selah.
11.13: Isusu Selah oyo ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 403 honu. Ne isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
11.14: Selah ne musum 30, isusu anai hanaie manaonete nanai Eber.
11.15: Isusu Eber oyo ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 403 honu. Ne isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
11.16: Eber ne musum 34, isusu anai hanaie manaonete nanai Peleg.
11.17: Isusu Peleg oyo ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 430 honu. Ne isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
11.18: Peleg ne musum 30, isusu anai hanaie manaonete nanai Rehu.
11.19: Isusu Rehu oyo ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 209 honu. Ne isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
11.20: Rehu ne musum 32, isusu anai hanaie manaonete nanai Serug.
11.21: Isusu Serug oyo ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 207 honu. Ne isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
11.22: Serug ne musum 30, isusu anai hanaie manaonete nanai Nahor.
11.23: Isusu Nahor oyo ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 200 honu. Ne isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
11.24: Nahor ne musum 29, isusu anai hanaie manaonete nanai Terah.
11.25: Isusu Terah oyo ikarihuru iamahai rotu-tu musum 119 honu. Ne isusu ne hehuka umau honu.
11.26: Terah ne musum 70, isusu ne hehuka hanaia tonu. Ia manaonete nanai Haran. Ia autihue nanai Abram. Ia muie nanai Nahor. Terah ne hehuka
11.27: Areini sou monae arihoni Terah. Terah isusu Haran, Abram, runa Nahor. Haran isusu anai hanaie manaonete nanai Lot.
11.28: Isusu Lot. Ereeu honu oyo amai, Haran, imatai pan ne niane hahae. Ne niane rei nanae Ur. Ur wapan otoe Babilonia. Haran imatai mo, amai iamahaiki asi.
11.29: Abram iausahai inana Sarai. Nahor inana Milka. Milka mo, Haran anai pina. Haran, anai hanaie isa honu, nanai Yiska.
11.30: Ne Sarai mo, imutui. Isusu tewa.
11.31: Terah sio ohitio oeu arihoni kota Ur ria otoe Babilonia. Terah ieu ikata anai hanaie Abram runa ne mananue Sarai, runa momoi Lot. Ateso nanie oeuso nau otoe Kanaan. Ne ohokaso pan nia Haran oyo orueso pan rei.
11.32: Orueso pan Haran oyo Terah imatai. Imatai tau ne musum 205.

12.1: Naone Yahweh iasau osi Abram. Iahata, “Aeua arihoni me niane, me ipane taue runa me numa hutu nohue. Oeumo pan otoe isa wani mka uautuu runai osia.
12.2: Au mka una mea upu momou panesi. Au mka urui iake osia. Au mka una nanam mainae. Pusu ano, mka urui iake osi sio pusiso.
12.3: Au mka urui iake osi sio wason oainisi na urui iake osia. Au mka urui kahatene osi sio wason oainisi na urui kahatene osia. Pusu ano, mka urui iake osi sio niana pusiso utuso mai tuniai reini.”
12.4: -5 Abram ihitio ieu arihoni nia Haran mo, ne musum hutu itu rahana nima. Ihitio ieui tau ipusu Yahweh ioiki. Abram ihitio ieu pan otoe Kanaan ikata sahai Sarai runa oai (wanin anai) Lot. Oeu orori no numa hutae runa no manianeu pusiso. Orori pusire waron osupure pan Haran. Ohokaso pan Kanaan oyo,
12.6: Abram sio oeu opusu otoe rei. Oeu rotu-tu ohokaso mai ai onate wani sio Kanaan oainisi oainaa runa no anahatanau waron titue tewa tanui. Ai onate wani mai More mai nia Sikhem. Tau rei sio Kanaan wason orueso pan otoe rei asi.
12.7: Yahweh iatuhete ruai osi Abram honu. Iahata, “Otoe reini mo, mka uruiki osi mea upu momou.” Abram iatinu san rei oyo, irane hatu noore sani anau nanie iainisi iainaa runa Yahweh tanure. Yahweh wain naone iatuhete ruai osiki rei.
12.8: Taa san rei ita ieui suru poe honu. Ieui poe otoe pupua poe nia Betel hae ranie matae eresaa. Hoka poe oyo, oapuoo no numa wani onanai arihoni makapana unta. Oapuooi kua Betel runa nia Ai uare nene tihue. Betel wani hae ranie matae eresohui, Ai wani hae ranie matae eresaa. Kua naniao rei iae, Abram irane hatu noore sani anau nanie iainisi iainaa runa Yahweh.
12.9: Ita ihitio ieui honu. Ieui arihoni otoe rei, ieui na poe otoe Negeb. Abram sio oeuso poe otoe Mesir
12.10: Mai otoe Kanaan atuhu iaka tewa reiso, omata muaine. Abram sio osupu muaina tewa, reiso oeu suru poe hainau honu. Oeuso rotu-tu ohokaso poe otoe Mesir. Hoka poe oyo, orueso rotu-tu musum waron omata muaine raniku.
12.11: Ne nanie oniku nenene na onusu poe Mesir, Abram iasau osi sahai Sarai. Iahata, “Ano. Ano mo, ano iake.
12.12: Munata sio poe Mesir onooa mka oahata, ‘Ia pina reimo sahai, kani ia rei tea.’ Reiso mka ohunuku. Ne ano mo, mka oapuhaia.
12.13: Reiso nene iake mo, ano asau ahata, ‘Hotaku. Asau san rei na pene ohunuku. Mka oamuiraku noso ano.’ ”
12.14: Abram sio ohokaso poe Mesir oyo, ereeu sani iasau rei. Iatinu sio Mesir oasau osi umau oahata, “Ina ee! Ia pina rei ia iake tunne maa!”
12.15: Ia ona aia hanai wanana umau roe ne numa aia onoo ia pina rei. Onooi oyo osima osi ia ona aia. Oahata, “Upu. Ia pina reinau mo, ia iake tunne nai osa.” Reiso oeu nau, onanai, ororiki roe ne numa.
12.16: Ia ona aia inoo runa Abram iake noso Sarai. Inoo runai iake reiso irui ne manianeu. Sio pinau runa sio hanaia. Irui ne rompau, ne une-uneu, ne koropou, ne unta, runa ne keledaiu. (Unta, nene totu unie mo, nene pupua sonota. Keledai nooi sani naitanane ne ikine man.)
12.17: Ne Yahweh irui kupua inaya waron mtinta raunaso omasikikiso osi ia ona aia runa sio pusiso wason okatai pan ne numa anoe. Ia ona aia inana Abram ne pina suanane, reiso Yahweh irui kupua inaya osiso.
12.18: Oyo ia ona aia ioi Abram nanie iasei tanui. Iahata, “Auna sae tanuku reini? Asima osiku runa ia pina reini ata saham tewa tahae hae?
12.19: Amuna na asima ata hotamu? Rotu-tu unanai tau sahaku. Reiso mai na anana saham na oeumo!”
12.20: Ia ona aia iaisosi ne makahaia na oautunu Abram sio rotu-tu ohokaso arihoni Mesir. Ieu ikata sahai runa ne numa hutae pusiki.

13.1: Abram ieui iarihoni otoe Mesir, ieu suru pan. Ieu pan otoe Kanaan on poe hae. Inusu pan Kanaan ikata sahai, oai runa no apia pusire.
13.2: Abram ne kaya mainae nea. Ne kaya tau ne rompau, ne une-uneu, ne koropou. Ne kaya tau ne hunahana runa ne perak.
13.3: Hoka pan oyo, ihitio ieu iarihoni naniai isa ihokai pan naniai isa honu. Ita ihitio honu ieu arihoni naniai rei ihokai pan naniai isa honu rotu-tu ihokai pan nia Betel. Ihokai pan Betel runa nia Ai uare tihue. Hoka pan tihue wani naone oapuoo no numa wani sio onanai arihoni makapana unta.
13.4: Naone irane hatu noore sani anau na iainisi iainaa runa Yahweh pan rei.
13.5: Oai Lot iae ne pina ne hehuka, ne manianeu, ne rompau, ne une-uneu, ne koropou.
13.6: Reiso otoe rei nene monota hutua ralai uaso no makapanau muaia tewa. Uaso no makapanau panesi onate.
13.7: Reiso sio wason osaka no makapanau rai oatana runa umau. (Tau rei sio Kanaan runa sio Peris orueso mai otoe rei asi.)
13.8: Abram iasau osi Lot san rei. “Oaku. Ita reini ita tamena tewa. Munata uata iatana runa umau, areimo iake tewa. Samatoro munata au we mamsakaya runa ano me mamsakaya oatana runa umau, areimo iake tewa.
13.9: Reiso nene iake uata ieu sakakau umau. Aroma hae supa wani me sukai. Munata ano aeu suru nau, au mka ueuku suru ria. Ne munata ano aeu suru ria, au mka ueuku suru nau.”
13.10: Reiso Lot ieu iararou inoo sui tihue otoe rei pusiki. Iararou inoo hae Wae Yordan nene Ekote rotu-tu poe nia Soar. Inoo ata hae reimo nene tihu panesi. Nooi sani Anahatana ne nisi on ihaye tau tuniai. Nooi sani otoe Mesir. (Inoo san rei on Yahweh iakanupu nia Sodom runa nia Gomora tewasi.)
13.11: Iararou inoo pusi oyo iroma hae Wae Yordan nene Ekote. Iroma pusi oyo, ieui ria Wae Yordan rei. Taa san rei oyo uaso oeu sakakau umau.
13.12: Abram iruei mai otoe Kanaan sirinia. Ne Lot iapuoo ne numa wani onanai arihoni makapana unta ria ekote tihue haineke Sodom.
13.13: Sio wason orueso mai Sodom reimo, sio kahatena mainae. Opalalosa mainae tau Yahweh. Abram isuka hae nia Hebron honu
13.14: Taa Lot ieui oyo, Yahweh iasau osi Abram. Iahata, “Ararou anoo ia-ia suru ria suru nau noi naniam wamo aooa reino.
13.15: Au mka urui otoe reini pusiki wani anooi reini osia runa mea upu momou. Uruiki osimo rotu-tu ria supan.
13.16: Au mka unaya asusu haha. Asusu haha rotu-tu ia isa man iae, ireken kuaso tewa. Noo sani tapuna poe tuamane. Ia isa ireken kuare tewa. Reiso ano mea upu momou iae mo, ia isa ireken kuaso tewa oi.
13.17: Au mka urui otoe reini pusiki osia. Reiso aeu sui otoe reini pusiki.”
13.18: Yahweh ianamana runai pusi, oyo iautotu ne numa waron onani arihoni makapana unta. Ita iapuooi honu haineke ai onata mai nia Mamre haineke nia Hebron. Iapuooi, oyo irane hatu noore sani anau, na iainisi iainaa runa Yahweh.

14.1: -2 Sio aiau ate ohiti nisa runa sio aiau nima. Sio aiau ate rei mo, Amrafel on pan otoe Babilonia. Ariokh on pan nia Elasar. Kedorlaomer on pan otoe Elam. Tideal ia ona aia tau sio Goyim. Sio aiau nima rei mo, wason, Bera on ria nia Sodom. Birsya on ria nia Gomora. Syninab on ria nia Adma. Semeber on ria nia Seboim. Ia ona aia on ria nia Bela. Bela mo, sio oaoiki tau Soar oi.
14.3: Sio aiau nima rei okata umau oamanou no tantarau ria Ekote Sidim. Muie reini sio oaoiki tau Wae Matane.
14.4: Ia ona aia Kedorlaomer irime sio aiau nima rotu-tu musum hutusa rahana ua nea. Ne nanie ereeu mai musum hutusa rahana tonu oimo, sio aiau nima rei ohiti nisa runai.
14.5: Oyo nene musum hutusa rahana ate sio aiau ate rei runa no tantarau oahita runa sio Refaim pan nia Asyterot-Karnaim. Ia ona aia Kedorlaomer sahoro irori arena osiso. Oahita oyo, sio aiau ate rei onesi. Ita oahita runa sio Susim poe nia Ham. Ateso onesi. Ita oahita runa sio Emim poe nia Syawe-Kiryataim. Ateso onesi sirinia.
14.6: Ita oahita runa sio Hori roe pupua ria Edom. Osui pususo poe otoe El-Paran poe otoe huie nusue. Ne sio onesi sirinia.
14.7: Osuiso pusi oyo, onunso na pan otoe En-Mispat. Muie reini sio oaoiki tau Kades. Ateso onesi sio Amalek reiso no otoe osiso. Ateso onesi tau sio Amori wason orueso poe nia Haseson-Tamar.
14.8: Sio aiau nimaso oamanou no tantarau ria Ekote Sidim oyo oahita
14.10: Ekote rei mo, aspal nene aikune. Aspal rei ereruei poe nonu anoe. Reiso sio tantarau arihoni Sodom runa Gomora nanie orumaso arihoni manahitane rei. Orumaso reiso oamnahuso poe nonu anoa rai. Ne sio umau osihaso orumaso na roe pupua.
14.11: Sio aiau ate rei onesi sirinia. Reiso owahu sio Sodom runa sio Gomora no apia pusire rotu-tu owahu no muaina oi. Owahu pusire oyo, oeuso.
14.12: Abram oai Lot iruei ria Sodom oi. Reiso sio owahui runa ne apia pusire oi.
14.13: Ne ia isa rerihoni sio tantarau rei isihai, reiso irumai suru nau nanie isima osi Abram, ia Ibrani rei. Abram iruei haineke ai onata. Ai onata rai, Mamre irahure. Mamre mo, ia arihoni sio Amori. Mamre nea waniu tau Eskol runa Aner. Tonuso oakahai Abram tau manahitana.
14.14: Taa Abram iatinu ata sio osota oai reiso iamanou ne manianeu wason okatai on sio ikina asi. Ne manianeu wason sio oatuheteso oahita. Sio reimo sio utun tonu hutusa rahana wanu. Reiso Abram iroriso nanie osui sio aiau ate rei. Osuiso rotu-tu ohokaso pan Dan.
14.15: Hoka pan oyo, isama ne tantarau tau tikana-tikana. Isamaso samatoro oahita runaso tau pumono. Abram sio onesiso. Isuiso rotu-tu ohokaso na pan nia Hoba pan kota Damsyik on pan hae.
14.16: Abram inesi reiso iwahu apia waron sio owahure rei. Inana oai runa ne apia oi. Iwahu sio Sodom runa sio Gomora no pinau hehuka oi. Melkisedek iainisi na Anahatana irui iake osi Abram
14.17: Abram inesi sio aiau ate rei wason ia ona aia Kedorlaomer iroriso. Inesi oyo inuniki. Ne ia ona aia arihoni nia Sodom ihokai mai Abram sio poe Ekote Syawe. Sio oaoiki tau Ekote Aia oi.
14.18: Melkisedek mo, ia ona aia tau nia Salem ihokai mai Abram. Ia mo, ia imam. Anahatana mo, ia mainae nai osa. Melkisedik irori poroti runa tihu anggur osi Abram.
14.19: Hoka pan oyo, iainisi na Anahatana irui iake osi Abram. Iahata, “Upuku Anahatana. Ano mo, ano mainae nai osa. Uainisi na arui iake osi Abram. Ahaye tau nante runa tuamane.
14.20: Uainaa runaya tau ano mo, ano mainae nai osa. Arui Abram inesi ne nisau pusiso utuso nea.” Iainisi iake osiki san rei, oyo Abram isama apia waron iwahure arihoni sio aiau ate rei tau pahakian hutusa. Samatoro irui pahakian osa osi Melkisedek.
14.21: Oyo ia ona aia Sodom iahata, “Anana apia waron awahure rai osi ruam na arui we pinau hehuka reino mai.”
14.22: Iahata, “Au usopa uamanane Yahweh Anahatana. Ia mo, Ia mainae nai osa. Ihaye tau nante runa tuamane.
14.23: Usopa ata au mka unana sae isa arihonia tewa. Masike nipa sinte isa iae, mka unanai arihonia tewa. Tea mo, mka ano asau ata au we kaya reini mo, noso ano.
14.24: Upeneku unana sae isa osi ruaku. Ne hasae unana sae waron we mansiau oaire nea. Ne we netau tonu reini, mka onana no pahakian. Sio reimo Aner, Esdol, runa Mamre.”

15.1: Taue isa, Abram inekei iamnii inoo Yahweh. Iahata, “Abram. Pene akaitau. Au unetea sani aniaue. Urui iake wani mainae osia tau ano mo, apusuku.”
15.2: -3 Iahata, “Yahweh wan arime tuniai reini. Arui we hehuka umau tewa reiso, mka ia seia isaka we numa hutae runa we rusun? Reiso ia wain mka isakare mo, we maniane, Elieser, ia Damsyik rei. Reiso nanie arui iake wani mainae rei osiku tau sae?”
15.4: Iahata, “Tewa. Mka anam hanaie ruai. Ia sahoro isaka me numa hutae rei. Me maniane isaka tewa.”
15.5: Yahweh irori Abram ihokai arihoni numa. Iahata, “Masi anoo roe nante na areken tau oneu rairo. Areken kuare te tewa? Mka mea upu momou panesi sani oneu rei oi.”
15.6: Abram iparisaa mainae tau Yahweh reiso Yahweh iahata anoi manisate.
15.7: Yahweh iahata, “Au sahoro Yahweh wan uaisosia ahokaya arihoni me kota Ur pan otoe Babilonia. Ahokaya na urui tapuna raini mai otoe Kanaan reini osia tau mea upu momou.”
15.8: Ne Abram iasei, “Yahweh, Ano wan arime tuniai reini. Sapani na uanei ata tuamana raini osi wea upu momou?”
15.9: Iahata, “Anana koropou inae isa, une-une inae isa runa rompa hanaie isa. Tonure nene musum tonu-tonu. Runa manu naka teura isa na manu puane isa.”
15.10: Reiso Abram inina makapanau rai osi Yahweh. Isupure oyo ihutu haka koropou, une-une runa rompa rai tau ua. Iaunuture na hae remanane hae. Ne manua rai ihutu hakare tewa.
15.11: Manua waron rarutu-rutu peni kopua nanie rarutu makapanau rai, ne Abram ineire.
15.12: Haineke ranie nanie eresohui, oyo Abram ineke munui nai osa. Ineke munui oyo ikaitau hunu ruai.
15.13: Yahweh iahata, “Anom repeka. Mka mea upu momou orueso noi nia tamene sani sio rakana. Sio mka ouna manianeu poe niane rei. Mka sinsaraso rotu-tu musum utun ate.
15.14: Ne sio wason ounaso tau manianeu mo, mka uapasanaso. Tau mea upu momou ohitio oeuso arihoni niane rei, mka orori no apia panesi.
15.15: Ano ruam mo, mka rotu-tu akore-korea amtuaya ia-ia. Amataya tau sanani, oyo oaunutua tau naniam iake.
15.16: Mea upu momou sio napisi ate oyo onunso mai tuamane reini. Mka unei sio Amori tewasi. Ne rotu-tu no kahatena mainaya samatoro uapasanaso. Uapasanaso, areimo uneiso arihoni tuamane reini, samatoro tuamane reini osi mea upu momou.”
15.17: Tau pumono oyo, sira tau usa wani erewenu mai naniae runa kamane wani ereai raeu pusu makapanau rai tihue.
15.18: Tau ranie hatae reimo Yahweh itotoe osi Abram. Iahata, “Au utotoe na mka urui tuamane reini osi mea upu momou. Urui tuamane on poe nenene poe Mesir rotu-tu pan Wae Efrat.
15.19: Mka urui sio Keni no tuamane. Urui sio Kenas, sio Kadmon,
15.20: sio Het, sio Peris, sio Refaim,
15.21: sio Amori, sio Kanaan, sio Girgasi runa sio Yebus no tuamana oi.”

16.1: -3 Abram iruei mai otoe Kanaan ne musum hutusa nea. Ne sahai, Sarai mo, isusu tewasi. Tau rei ne ia pina makahaie isa iruei ikataso. Ia makahaie rei, ia pina Mesir. Nanai Hagar. Ia makahaie rei ia pina hehuke asi. Reiso Sarai iasau osi sahai, “Yahweh iruiku ususu tewa. Reiso nene iake mo, anana re makahaie reini tau saham. Na hitio isusu osiku.” Oyo Abram iamanaku. San rei oyo, Sarai irui Hagar osi Abram tau sahai muie.
16.4: Reiso Abram inanai. Inanai oyo, sahai muie rei tinain taua. Ne sahai muie rei ianei ata tinain taua, reiso inana hatia tau Sarai. Iunai iake tewa.
16.5: Oyo Sarai iasau osi sahai, “Urui Hagar, re makahaie rei osia tau saham nea. Ne ianei ata tinain taua oyo, iunaku iake tewa. Ano sahoro asana. Ne napa sahoro Yahweh inoo uata re isanae reini, na iarinii ia seia sahoro ne manisate runa ia seia sahoro isana.”
16.6: Iahata, “Me makahaie rei, tea. Reiso ruam auna sae man tanui. Ano me kawasa tanui. Aunai pusu ruam me maue man nea, tea.” Oyo Sarai ne hau tanui sui osa. Reiso rotu-tu Hagar irumai.
16.7: Irumai oyo sira tau Yahweh iatuhete ruai osiki nooi sani Yahweh ne maisosie on roe noiyaha. Iatuhete ruai osiki haineke wae huhune poe arena nusue poe otoe huie. Arena rei nanie ereeu poe nia Sur.
16.8: Iatuhete ruai iahata, “Hagar! Sarai ne makahaie! Ano on supa, nanie aeua supa?” Iahata, “Upuku. Nanie urumaku arihoni upuku.”
16.9: Iahata, “Anunia pan tanui na apakarian osiki.
16.10: Au mka urui mea upu momou panesi. Mka rotu-tu sio oreken kuaso tewa.
16.11: Potuina tewa oyo, mka asusu me ia ikine hanaie isa. Ahete nanai tau Ismael. Tea mo, ano arani Yahweh iatinu.
16.12: Ne anam hanaie rei, mka iatinu tau maunauna tewa. Mka ituntana runa mansiau panesi. Sio mansiau iae, mka otuntana runai oi. Ia mka iruei ikata ne mansiau tewa.”
16.13: Hagar iasei pan anoi, “Kani unoo Anahatana nea reisi? Anahatana wain ino-noo au sui osa!” Reiso ihete Anahatana nanai tau, “Anahatana wain ino-noo.”
16.14: Reiso sio oaoi wae huhune rei tau Lahai-Roi. Nene nohue, “Ia wain iamahaiki wain ino-nooku ne wae huhune.” Wae huhune rei wapo nia Kadesy runa nia Bered tihue. Wapo rotu-tu reini.
16.15: -16 Abram ne musum hutu wanu rahana nome oyo Hagar anai hanaie iamrai. Oyo amai Abram ihete nanai tau Ismael.

17.1: Abram ne musum hutu sia rahana sia. Ita Yahweh iatuhete ruai osiki. Iahata, “Au mo, au Anahatana wani we kawasa mainae erenesi sio pusiso. Apusu we maue sui osa.
17.2: Au mka utotoe osia na urui mea upu momou panesi. Mka urime ia-ia tau sae wani utotoe reini.”
17.3: Oyo Abram irike tune iakapuni ain. Irike tune oyo, Anahatana iahata,
17.4: “Au reini mo, utotoe runaya. Ano mka auna numa upue osi sio niana-niana.
17.5: Reiso nanie ukati nanam. Nanam Abram tewa nea. Ne nanam honue mo, Abraham.
17.6: Au mka urui mea upu momou panesi. Arihoni sio panesi reimo, mka sio umau ouna aiau. Mea upu momou rei, sio panesi mka oapuoo niana-niana.
17.7: Wani utotoe rei, mka uruiki osia runa mea upu momou rotu-tu ria supan. Ano runa mea upu momou oainisi oainaa runaku. Au sahoro Anahatana wani sio oainisi oainaa runaku.
17.8: Muie reini omi orue tau tuamane reini sani omi rakana asi. Ne mka uruiki osia runa mea upu momou. Tuama Kanaan reini, urui pusiki utue osi mea upu momou rotu-tu ria supan. Au mo, au Anahatana wani sio oainisi oainaa runaku.
17.9: -10 Ano iae, kahurae apusu maunaune reini. Kahurae orehi pusimo. Ano runa mea upu momou kahurae opusu maunaune reini. Sio hanaia pusiso kahurae orehiso.
17.10: 11-12 Oni ranie hatae reini sio iki hanaia wason no onona itu pusiso kahurae orehiso. Sio manianeu wason oamrai mai me numa, kahurae orehiso oi. Runa sio wason ohaneso rei oi. Sio hanaia pusiso wason orueso mai me numa kahurae orehiso. Sio wason me hehuka, sio wason me hehuka tewa oi. Orehimo rei, ereuna anomo rapeka runa wani au utotoe reini sui osa.
17.13: Omi hanaia pusimo kahurae orehimo. Orehimo na rauna anomo rapeka runa wani utotoe reini. Utotoe rotu-tu ria supan.
17.14: Sio hanaia wason orehimo tewa mo, nooi sani Au we mansiau tewa nea. Tea mo, orime we maunaune reini tewa.
17.15: Isa honu. Saham Sarai mo, ukati nanai tau Sara. Nanai Sarai tewa nea.
17.16: Au mo, mka urui iake osiki na isusu anai hanaie isa wain mka uruiki osia. Urui iake osi Sara na iuna ia pina numa upue osi sio niana-niana. Arihoni nea upu momou reimo, mka sio umau ouna aiau oi.”
17.17: Oyo Abraham irike tune iakapuni ain ne, iauman. Iasau pan anoi, “Ia hanaie kore-korene isa sani au reini mka ususu ia iki hanaie isa asi si? We musum utun nea reini! Ia pina isa ikore-korei sani Sara reini isusu asi si? Ne musum hutu sia nea reini!”
17.18: Oyo Abraham iasau osi Anahatana. Iahata, “Ismael isaka we numa hutae man nea, tea!”
17.19: Ne Anahatana iahata, “Tewa. Saham Sara ruai mka isusu anam hanaie isa. Saka ahete nanai tau Isak. Au mka ukata sae wani utotoe reini rotu-tu ria supan.
17.20: Ano ainisi rerihoni Ismael rei mo, mka uatinu tanua. Reiso mka urui iake osiki. Urui nea upu momou panesi. Ia mka iuna numa upue tau ipana hutusa rahana ua. Nea upu momou mo, mka au unaso orime otoe wani mainae oi.
17.21: Ne wani utotoe reini mo, mka una usuiki osi Isak. Isak anam wain mka Sara isusui rei. Isusui musum reinau sani musum hunana raini.”
17.22: Iasau pusi san rei oyo Anahatana ieu iarihoniki.
17.23: Nene ranie hatae rei oyo, Abraham ipusu Anahatana ne maunaune rei reiso irehi anai hanaie Ismael runa sio hanaia noi ne numa anoe pusiso. Irehiso ne manianeu oi. Ne manianeu wason oamrai noi ne numa runa sio wason ihaneso.
17.24: Abraham irehiso reimo, tau ne musum hutu sia rahana sia.
17.25: Tau rei anai hanaie Ismael ne musum hutusa rahana tonu.
17.26: Orehi uaso tau ranie hatae osa rei oi

18.1: Yahweh ihoka ruai osi Abraham haineke ai onate poe nia Mamre. Tau rei, ranie katopu. Abraham iru-ruei poe ne numa wani sio onanai rerihoni makapana unte. Iruei poe mitanunue.
18.2: Ihetu unui, isira tau sio tonu wason oooso mai uai anoe nea. Inoo san rei, iruma noi inapaso, oyo irike tune iakapuni aio.
18.3: Iahata, “Wea upu. Pene oniku we numa. Onusu mai na, oaimo ee.
18.4: Onusu mai na osohu aimo atua ee. Na oaranahamo mkane mai ai nohue reini ee,
18.5: na unoo runa muaine osimo. Oaimo na oamkona na oeu kua. Hokamo mai numa nea reiso, oaimo ee, samatoro oeumo.” Oahata, “Iake. Aranahama mkane ee.”
18.6: Reiso Abraham imale suru ria suru nau. Inusui pan numa anoe, iasau osi sahai. Iahata, “Anana rapu tariku karuni isa mai. Tariku wani ohie rei, na auna poroti hua isa.”
18.7: Oyo iruma ria ne makapanau nene koka. Iroma koropou anae wani kopo-kopotuene. Nene henate mo, manne. Ihokai arihoni koka anoe rei samatoro, iruiki osi ne makahaie. Ne makahaie rei irehiki, oyo ihutui rapu-rapu.
18.8: Taa san rei oyo, Abraham inana koropou nene susu, oyo inana nene susu wani mataanoe runa koropou anae nene henate wani masae nea rei. Inanare oyo iratare osi sio onata tonu rei. Wasoni oaiso, Abraham iooi isakaso poe ai nohue rei.
18.9: Oaiso suka oyo, oasei, “Sahamu, Sara oi?” Iahata, “Waipan numa anoe.”
18.10: Ia isa iata, “Nene hunana sia rainau, mka uhokaku mai honu. Tau rei mka saham isusu hanaie isa nea.” Iasau san rei, Sara iatinu haineke mitanunue pan ia onate rei totui.
18.11: Ne Abraham runa Sara uaso okore-kore oamtuaso nea. Sara isupu hunane tewa nea.
18.12: Reiso Sara iauman pan anoe. Iahata, “Ukore-koreku na ukua tewa nea reini. Sapan na anoku mirike na ususu? Samatoro Abraham ikore-korei iamtuai nea reini!”
18.13: Oyo Yahweh iasei tau Abraham, “Sae remuna na Sara iauman rei? Sapan na Sara iasei iahata, ‘Sapan na ia pina kore-korene isa sani au reini mka ususu asi?’
18.14: Au, Upum, we kawasa una sae man. Sani sinasi uasau wani mka hunana sia rainau uhokaku honu. Tau rei Sara anai hanaie iamrai nea.”
18.15: Sara ikaitau reiso iauhuni iahata, “Tewa. Au uauman tewa.” Ne Yahweh iahata, “Tewa. Ano sinasi auman.” Abraham iainisi tau Yahweh osi sio Sodom
18.16: Tonuso osima runa Abraham anai hanaie suka, oyo nanie onunso. Abraham iautunuso. Oeu rotu-tu ateso ohokaso ria tihue otoe isa haineke kota Sodom. Haineke Sodom reiso onoo na poe Sodom.
18.17: Yahweh iasei pan anoi, “Kani mka upeneku tau usima runa sae wani nanie unai tau sio Sodom rei osi Abraham?
18.18: Ne arihoni ia sahoro nea upu momou sio panesi. Sio panesi reiso mka no kawasa mainae. Reiso uauhuni runai sapan? Mka urui iake osi sio niana pusire mai tuniai reini tau arihoni ia.
18.19: Tea mo, uromai nea. Uromai nanie iaisosi ne hehuka nea upu momou. Iaisosiso na opusuku. Iaisosiso nanie onana sae waron manisata. Pusire waron utotoe osi Abraham rei mka una suire. Una suire hete sae, opusuku. Onana sae waron manisata rai.”
18.20: Oyo Yahweh iasau osi Abraham, “Sio wason osima osiku oahata, ‘Nia Sodom runa nia Gomora mo, nene kahatena panesi. Sapani na apasanaso tewa?’ No rosau raimo kahatena mainaya.
18.21: Reiso mka uhokaku pan, na unoo sae waron sio oasau runare rei. Unoo ata kani manisate te tewa.”
18.22: Oyo sio onata ua wason okata Yahweh rei, ruao oeuso na poe Sodom. Ne Yahweh ikata Abraham asi.
18.23: Uaso oeuso oyo Abraham iasei, “Upuku. Titue si? Mka ohunu sio wason anoo manisata runa sio wason anoo kahatena rei pusiso?
18.24: Sani sio hutu nima wason anoo kahatena tewa poe niane rei, kani mka ahunu sio Sodom pusiso utuso sirinia si? Te mka apuheu sio pusiso na sio hutu nima rei oamahaiso?
18.25: Pene ahunu sio wason anoo manisata rei runa sio wason anoo kahatena rei pusiso. Pene, Upu. Tea mo, ahunu sio wason anoo kahatena tewa rei okata sio rei, tea! Ano wani arinii ia sia wain titue na ia sia wain titue tewa. Reiso, kahurae auna sae wani manisate. Pene ahunu sio wason anoo manisata rei tea.”
18.26: Iahata, “Sani usupu sio hutu nima poe Sodom wason anoo manisata mo, mka uapuhai sio Sodom pusiso utuso noso sio hutu nima rei.”
18.27: Iahata, “Upuku. Pene akapuku tanuku ee. Tea mo, unesi-nesi uainisi tanua honu. Aikee au ikine honue.
18.28: Ne sani poe niane rei, sio hutu ate rahana nima man wason anoo manisata. Mka ahunu pusiso tau hasae sio nima man?” Iahata, “Sani usupu sio hutu ate rahana nima rei wason anoo manisata, mka uhunu pusiso tewa.”
18.29: Iahata, “Upuku. Sani sio hutu ate man mo, sapan?” Iahata, “Noso sio hutu ate rei, mka uhunso tewa.”
18.30: Iahata, “Upuku. Pene akapuku tanuku sani uanamana honu. Sani hasae sio hutu tonu man mo, sapan?” Iahata, “Sani usupu sio hutu tonu mo, mka uhunso tewa.”
18.31: Iahata, “Upuku. Pene apasanaku ee. Tea mo, mka uainisi arihonia honu. Sani hasae sio hutu ua man mo, sapan?” Iahata, “Sani usupu sio hutu ua man mo, mka uhunso tewa.”
18.32: Iahata, “Upuku. Pene akapuku tanuku ee. Tea mo, au mka uainisi arihonia nai osa-sa honu. Sani asupu sio hutusa man mo, sapan?” Iahata, “Sani sio hutusa wason anoo manisata, mka uhunso tewa sirinia.”
18.33: Yahweh ianamana pusi oyo ieu arihoni Abraham, oyo Abraham inuniki roe ne numa.

19.1: Sio maisosia ua on roe noiyaha oeu arihoni Abraham nanie oeuso poe kota Sodom. Ohokaso poe tau pumono. Lot wain iru-ruei mai kota rei nene mitanunue. Taa inoo uaso, oyo iooi inapaso. Ohoka mai tanui, oyo irike tune iakapuni uaso aio.
19.2: Iahata, “Wea upu. Osinimo mai we numa ee. Na osohu aimo. Onekemo mai we numa ee. Na hanu roe samatoro wea upu uamo oeumo tau omnano tunne honu.” Oahata, “Iake. Ruae nea. Mka anekema mai tuama huie mai kota tihue reini.”
19.3: Ne Lot iapa-apamanuso. Iahata, “Tewa wea upu. Mai na poe onekemo poe we numa nea.” Iapamanuso rotu-tu uaso opusui pan numa anoe. Lot iaisosi ne makahaia na okotu poroti wani erepake nehue tewa osiso samatoro iratare runa muaina waron iaka osi uaso na oaire.
19.4: Ne uaso omakawanaso asi, sira tau sio hanaia pusiso poe Sodom ohoka on ria on nau ohori pusi numa rei. Pusiso ohoka ohori Lot ne numa rei. Sio mtuana kore-korena runa sio honua pusiso utuso.
19.5: Pusiso oakapona Lot. Oasei, “Sio hanaia ua wason ohokaso onekeso mai me numa rei wason wanpa? Ahokaso mai osima, na asoulahaso!”
19.6: Lot ihokai arihoni numa anoe oyo iraru mitanunue.
19.7: Iahata, “Wea amau, wea kakau waniu. Uainisi arihonimo. Pene ouna kahatene san rei.
19.8: Ne masi oatinu. Au we hehu pinau tunna ua wason. Reiso uruiso osimo na ounaso pusu ruamo mo maue. Hete sae, pene una sae isa tau sio ua wason ohokaso reini. Tea mo, uapusaaso mai we numa nea. Reiso kahurae uneteso.”
19.9: Ne oahata, “Aeua! Ano mo, ano rakane man rei! Ano mo, ano sia, nani asau ata ami asana? Reiso aeua teria kahu matam. Tea mo, mka auna kahatene mainae tanua ranesi sio ua reino.” Oyo oruru heu Lot, nanie oruru heu mitanunue.
19.10: Ne sio ua wason ohokaso rei, oakahuu Lot hanai atue, samatoro onesai pan numa anoe. Onesai oyo oraru mitanunue.
19.11: Uaso ouna sio panesi rei onoo mosa tewa reiso sio panesi rei onoo mosa mitanunue rei tewa nea. Oyo pusiso utuso matao usena raputiso.
19.12: Uaso oasau osi Lot. “Sani me hehuka hanaia umau, me hehuka pinau umau, me msahana runa me enau umau mai kota reini mo, asau osiso na pusimo ohokamo.
19.13: Tea mo, kota reini mka ami apumokoi. Sio panesi osima osi Yahweh oahata, ‘Sio Sodom no kahatena mainaya. Reiso apasanaso tewa tahae?’ Reiso Yahweh iaisosima mai, na apumoko Sodom reini.”
19.14: Reiso Lot ieui iasau osi ne hehuka pinau uare no hanaia wason nanie onanaso rei. Iahata, “Orapu na ihokata arihoni kota reini. Tea mo, Yahweh nanie iapumokoi nea.” Ne sio ata kani noa ama iakasiru man.
19.15: Tau ereputi-puti asi sio maisosia ua rei oaisosi Lot sio oeuso on sini. Oahata, “Sisaa! Aeua runa saham runa me hehuka pinau uaso na pene omokomo. Pene omatamo tau kota wani nanie eremokoi reini.”
19.16: Lot iarinii asi. Ne Yahweh anoi runai. Reiso sio onata ua rei oakahuu hanai oyo onesai runa sahai runa ne hehuka pinau. Pusiso ohokaso arihoni kota rei.
19.17: Hokaso arihoni kota rei, oyo ia isa arihoni sio ua rei iahata, “Orumamo na oamahaimo. Pene onoo hae muie. Pene oaranahamo sui ekote reini. Orumamo na roe pupua. Orumamo na pene omatamo.”
19.18: Ne Lot iahata, “Ira oe, upu! Pene aisosima arumama na roe pupua.
19.19: Upu. Omi oakahaima na amahaima nea mo, muna? Ne pene aisosima orumama roe pupua raimo hainau maa! Pene rotu-tu ahokama roe rei tewasi oimo, kota reini eremokoi nea. Mka amatama oi!
19.20: Reiso masi anoo pan uae reipan. Nia ikine isa waria haineke nea. Reiso otapima arumama na ria nia ikine rei man na amahaima.”
19.21: Iahata, “Iake. Nia ikine rei, mka uapumokoi tewa.
19.22: Oruma rapu. Tea mo, au iae uapumoko kota Sodom tewasi rotu-tu ahokaya ria nia ikine rei ee samatoro uapumokoi.” Lot iasau iahata, “Niane rei ikine man reiso ohete nanae tau Soar.” Nene nohue “Nia ikine”.
19.23: Lot ihokai pan Soar mo, ranie eresaa nea.
19.24: Sira tau Yahweh irati aspal wani usa ereai-ai tanui nooi sani uane. Iratiki poe Sodom runa Gomora hahaya.
19.25: Kotau ua rai ramokoso. Runa ekota hanaya, atuhu ai nohua, runa mansia pusiki wason orueso sui tihue rei pusiki oi.
19.26: Ne Lot sahai inoo hae muie reiso ineniki tau masine, nooi sani hatu.
19.27: Nene omnano tunne rei, oyo Abraham ieui roe tihue wani iooi ikata Yahweh rei.
19.28: Inoo na poe Sodom runa Gomora. Inoo usa wenue ereputi sui ekote rei pusiki. Inoo sani usa reinuna.
19.29: Anahatana iapumoko kotau waron Lot iruei tanure. Ne anoi repeka runa Abraham reiso itapi Lot irumai. Lot runa ne hehuka pinau uaso
19.30: Lot ihitio ieui iarihoni nia Soar ikata ne hehuka pinau uaso. Tea mo, ikaitau. Reiso oeuso roe tinetaya nanie orueso roe rei. Orueso pan hatu nohue isa anoe.
19.31: Taue isa ia iki pina manaonete iasau osi wanin san rei. Iahata, “Amari ikore-korei nea. Mai tihue reini ia iki hanaie isa tewa. Sapani na mka iausahata na isusu?
19.32: Reiso mai na uata iuna amari ininu tihu minne na imukei. Imukei oyo ineketa runai na isusu.”
19.33: Oyo nene mono rei ouna noa ama ininu tihu minne, oyo amai imukei. Imukei oyo anai pina manaonete inekei runai. Ne amai imukei mainae reiso ianei ruai tewa nai osa. Ianei tewa ata inekei runa anai pina.
19.34: Nene hanu roe omnanoe iasau osi wanin. Iahata, “Monosi unekeku runa amaku nea. Reiso nene mka-mka mono iuna amari ininu honu na ano anekea runai. Mka uata isusu re hehuka.”
19.35: Reiso nene mono rei uaso ouna noa ama ininu honu rotu-tu imukei mainae. Ita ia iki pina muie inekei runai honu. Ne amai imukei mainae reiso ianei ruai tewa nai osa.
19.36: Reiso ne hehuka ua rei tinaio taua tau noa ama ruai.
19.37: Ia iki pina manaonete iruei runa anai hanaie. Ihete nanai tau Moab. Ia sahoro sio Moab no numa upue rotu-tu reini.
19.38: Ia iki pina muie isusu anai hanaie oi. Ihete nanai tau Ben-Ami. Arihoni ia sahoro sio Amon no numa upue rotu-tu reini.

20.1: Abraham ihitio ieu arihoni nia Mamre ieui napi na poe otoe Kanaan nene nenene on poe hae. Hoka poe oyo, orueso poe nia Kades runa nia Syur uare tihue. Ereruma kani hunana inasa rai, oyo Abraham isuka iruei ria nia Gerar.
20.2: Iasau osi sio ria rei ata Sara mo hotai. Reiso ia aia tau niane rei nanai Abimelekh iaisosi ne makahaia. Iahata, “Rori hotai rei mai osiku ee.”
20.3: Oyo taue isa ineke iamnii. Anahatana ihokai iasau osiki. Iahata, “Ano mka amataya. Ano arori ia pina rei mai me numa mo, ia sahai wain nea.”
20.4: Ne Abimelekh ineke runai tewasi. Reiso iahata, “Upuku. Au usana tewa. Pene ahunuku runa we mansiau pusima.
20.5: Abraham ruai isima ata ia pina reimo hotai. Tewa ne ia pina rei ruai iasau san rei oi. Au uanaha runa ia pina rei, anoku manisate. Reiso au usana tewa.”
20.6: Reiso Anahatana iahata, “E-e. Uanei ata ano aroriki mai tau anom manisate. Reiso unetea na pene apalalosa tanuku. Utapia anekea runa ia pina rei tewa.
20.7: Hete sae anei nea, reiso auni ia pina rei osi sahai nea. Sahai mo, ia wain ia mamsima runa au, Anahatana, we maunauna. Mka iainisi osia na pene amataya. Ne sani auni ia pina rei tewa reimo, saka atinu. Mka ruam runa me mansiau omata pusimo.”
20.8: Nene hanroe omnanoe tunne san rei oyo, Abimelekh ianaha runa ne makahaia oyo isima runa ne niine rei osiso. Reiso okaitau hunu ruao.
20.9: Isima osiso pusi oyo, ianaha runa Abraham oi. Ihokai mai tanui oyo, iahata, “Ano auna masana sae tanuma reini? We masana sae tanua reiso auna siraka reini osiku runa we mansiau pusima reini? Sani rei mo, iake tewa. Kahurae pene auna siraka reini osiku.
20.10: Amuna na auna san rei osiku rei?”
20.11: Iahata, “Upu. Uata kani mai rei omi umau okaitau Anahatana tewa reiso mka ohunuku. Uata kani mka sio wason okaumin runa sahaku mka ohunuku.
20.12: Nene manisate ia mo, hotaku. Uama mania ama osa. Mania inau sakakau. Ne uama anana umau.
20.13: Reiso Anahatana iaisosiku ueu arihoni amaku ne numa ueu na noi nia rakana. Reiso uasau osi sahaku uahata, ‘Sani anom runaku reimo asau osi sio wason uata isupuso pena niana-niana ata au mo, hotamu.’ ”
20.14: Taa san rei, oyo Abimelekh iuni Sara osi sahai. Tau rei irui Abraham ne manianeu umau. Sio pinau runa sio hanaia. Irui ne rompau umau runa ne koropou umau.
20.15: Iahata, “Abraham. Otoa rasu mai mo, au we otoa pusire. Reiso aruea pusu ruam me maue.”
20.16: Ita iahata osi Sara, “Hotam reini mo, urui kepen panesi osiki nea. Urui perak inata nihuni na pusiso oanei ata ano mo asana tewa.”
20.17: -18 Abimelekh irori Sara mai ne numa, reiso Yahweh iuna sio pinau pusiso noi rei omutuso. Omutuso noso Sara. Ne Abimelekh iuni Sara nea, reiso Abraham iainisi tau Anahatana osi Abimelekh sio. Reiso Anahatana iunaso iake nea. Reiso sahai runa ne pina makahaia osusu honu.

21.1: -5 Abraham ne musum utun. Ikore-korei iamtuai nea. Oyo Yahweh irui iake osi Sara sani Ia ruai itotoe rei nea. Sara anai hanaie iamrai tau hunane wan Anahatana ruai iaunutu umetene tanui. Oyo amai ihete nanai tau Isak. Tau Isak ne onona itu amai irehiki. Naone Anahatana iaisosiki irehi sio iki hanaia pusiso. Reiso irehi Isak oi.
21.6: Isak iamrai poe, oyo inai iahata, “Anahatana irui iake osiku reiso uauman. Tea mo, ukaumin. Sio pusiso oatinu ata ususu nea mka oauman, okaumin okataku.
21.7: Naone sio oasei tau sahaku, oahata, ‘Ia pina reino mka isusu?’ Masike amai ikore-korei iamtuai nea iae, ususu osiki sirinia.”
21.8: Ia ikine rei ipira iruhu. Iruhu ia mainae mkane nea, oyo inai iarihoni susu runai. Iarihoni susu reiso ouna karisaa mainae. Abraham inei Ismael runa inai
21.9: Taue isa Ismael, Abraham anai hanaie rei, iauman Isak. Isak inai tau Sara, ne Ismael inai tau Hagar, ia pina Mesir rei.
21.10: Sara inoo san rei oyo, ipenei tau Ismael nea. Reiso iasau osi Abraham. Iahata, “Nei ia pina makahaie reino runa anai rei. Upeneku tau usama ano me numa hutae reini tau ua. Kahurae anaku hanaie Isak isupu pusire oo!”
21.11: Ne Abraham ipenei tau iatinu sou nanae rei asi. Tea mo, Ismael iae anai oi.
21.12: Ne Anahatana iasau osiki. Iahata, “Pene anom reuponu runa me makahaie runa anam hanaie rei. Apusu Sara ne maue rei. Tea mo, arihoni Isak sahoro asupu mea upu momou wason utotoe osia nea rei.
21.13: Ne Hagar anai Ismael iae mka san rei oi. Mka au una nea upu momou panesi oi. Tea mo, ia iae, anam oi.”
21.14: Nene hanu omnano tunne san rei oyo, Abraham irui no wekau. Iaiinu tihu tau tasi wani sio onanai arihoni makapana unte. Tasi rei Abraham iakatanai mai Hagar sanini ukune. Oyo iaisosiki ieui runa anai rei. Uaso oeu oneka pusi otoe huie wani nanae Bersyeba.
21.15: Oeu rotu-tu no tihu wani ororiki rei pusiki, oyo Hagar iautue anai poe ai hasa-hasan isa nohue.
21.16: Oyo iruei hainau mkane arihoni anai sani sio oana niune ereruma remnahu hainau arihoniso. Iasau pan anoi, “Upeneku tau unoo ia ikine rei imatai asi.” Reiso irani.
21.17: Ia ikine rei irani oi. Anahatana iatinui. Reiso Anahatana ne maisosie on roe noiyaha ioi Hagar on roe nante. Iahata, “Hagar. Anom reuponu runa sae rei? Pene akaitau. Anahatana iatinu anam irani nea.
21.18: Eua haineke anam reipan na apamanui. Au mka una nea upu momou panesi.”
21.19: Oyo Anahatana iuna Hagar inoo iake. Reiso inoo parike isa. Inooi oyo, ieu pan, iripa tihu, samatoro iaiinui tau ne tasi rei honu. Iaiinui pusi oyo, iuna anai ininu.
21.20: -21 Anahatana ikata runa Ismael. Reiso ia ikine rei iruhu nanie ia mainae nea. Orueso ria otoe huie wani nanae Paran. Ia ikine rei ianei irime henue, ianei iana iake nea. Inai iaisosi runa ia pina Mesir isa tau sahai. Abraham runa Abimelekh uaso osopa
21.22: Tau rei ia ona aia Abimelekh runa ne kapitane, Pikhol, ohokaso mai Abraham. Oahata, “Anahatana iakahaia tau me pakarian pusire waron ananare rei.
21.23: Reiso mai na asopa mai Anahatana uai anoe. Asopa ata ano mo, mka akarota au tewa runa we hehuka wea upu momou pan muie. Sani we iake runaya, reiso auna iake osi au san rei oi. Auna iake osi au runa sio mai tihue otoe wani aruea reini.”
21.24: Iahata, “E-e. Iake. Mka usopa san rei.”
21.25: Ne Abraham iamanaru Abimelekh ne makahaia osiki. Iahata, “Me makahaia owahu parike arihoniku nea.”
21.26: Iahata, “Au uanei tewa ata ia seia iwahui. Asima na reini osiku tewasi. Reiso mato uatinu reini tea!”
21.27: Oyo Abraham irui rompau runa koropou umau osi Abimelekh. Oyo uaso osopa.
21.29: Ianenare oyo Abimelekh iasei, “Amuna na anena rompau rai rei?”
21.30: Iahata, “Ananare noi, na uanei ata ano amanaku ata au sahoro ukani parike reini tea.”
21.31: Reiso tihue rei nanae Bersyeba tau poe rei uaso osopa. Bersyeba nene nohue “Parike Mamsopae.”
21.32: Osopa poe Bersyeba suka, oyo Abimelekh runa Pikhol uaso onunso nau sio Pilistin no otoe.
21.33: Onunso, oyo Abraham irahu ai tamariska anae isa mai Bersyeba. Irahui suka, oyo iainisi iainaa runa Yahweh Anahatana wain iamahaiki rotu-tu ria supan.
21.34: Taa san rei oyo iruei potuina mai sio Pilistin no otoe.

22.1: Taue isa Anahatana nanie irea Abraham ata kani anoi runai mainae erenesi anai hanaie ruai te tewa. Reiso Anahatana ioiki san rei, “Abraham.” Oyo iahata, “Sae rei, Upu.”
22.2: Iahata, “Abraham. Aeu akata anam hanaie Isak wain anom runai mainae rei. Waini ruai man rei. Aeu akatai roe otoe Moria. Mka usima runa tinetae isa roe rei osia. Saka aeu roe na akanupu anam rei osiku.”
22.3: Nene hanu roe omnano tunne san rei oyo, Abraham ihanui ireta menie. Ireta menie tau nanie iakanupu Isak. Ireta pusi, oyo iapusaa makapana unte roe keledai totue unie tau Isak naniai. (Keledai, nooi sani naitanane ne ikine man.) Oyo ioi ne makahaia ua runa anai hanaie Isak. Iahata, “Mai, na ieuta ria iakanupu makapana osi Anahatana.” Oyo ohitio oeuso onina tihue wani Anahatana iasau osiki rei.
22.4: Oeu rotu-tu nene onona tonu san rei oyo, Abraham iararoo roe uae inoo tihue wani Anahatana isima runai osiki rei. Inooi hainau mkane asi.
22.5: Oyo iasau osi ne makahaia, iahata, “Uamo onapama mai rei runa keledai reini. Au runa anaku hanaie uama mka aeuma roe tinetae reiro na nanie ainisi ainaa runa Anahatana samatoro uama anunima mai tanumo honu.”
22.6: Oyo Abraham isiu menia rai, iautuere roe Isak sanini ukune. Ia ruai sahoro irori usa runa seite. Uaso oeu opusu-pusu umau,
22.7: oyo Isak ioi amai, “Ama.” Iahata, “Sae rei anaku?” Iasei, “Ita irori usa runa menia nea reini. Ne rompa anae wanpa tau nanie iakanupui osi Anahatana?”
22.8: Iahata, “Anaku. Anahatana ruai sahoro mka irui rompa anae rei osita na iakanupui.” Uaso suru roe oeuso sui osa.
22.9: Oeu rotu-tu ohokaso roe tinetae wani Anahatana isima runai osi Abraham rei. Hoka roe oyo, irane hatu noore sani anau. Iranere pusi, samatoro iaunutu menia on roe haha. Oyo ikanihoo anai hanaie, samatoro iautuei roe hatu hahae runa menia rai na iakanupui.
22.10: Oyo inana seite na nanie irehi anai hanaie rei.
22.11: Nanie irehiki ne sira tau Yahweh ne maisosie on roe noiyaha ioi on roe nante. Iahata, “Abraham, Abraham.” Iahata, “Sae rei, Upu?”
22.12: “Pene arehi ia ikine reino. Pene akanupui ee. Ranie hatae reini mato uanei ia-ia ata ano mo, anom runaku nai osa erenesi ruam anam hanaie reino. Reiso ano sahunuti anam hanaie osa reino arihoniku tewa.”
22.13: Oyo Abraham ihetu unui, isira tau inoo rompa hanaie isa wanau remaninui tau nene sepi-sepia ratala tau ai sanaya. Oyo ieu nau, inana rompa rei na iakanupui osi Anahatana erekati anai hanaie rei.
22.14: Reiso ioi tihue rei tau Yahweh Irui. Reiso muie reini iae sio oaoi tinetae rei tau Tinetae Yahweh Irui sirinia.
22.15: Ita ia maisosie rei iasau on roe nante honu.
22.16: -17 “Yahweh iahata, ‘Usopa tau ruaku nanaku mka urui iake osia. Tea mo, arui anam hanaie osa rei osiku. Asahunutiki arihoniku tewa. Reiso mka urui iake osia. Urui mea upu momou panesi nooso sani oneu roe nante. Panesi nooso sani sisia nau nuae. Mea upu momou mka no kawasa tau no nisau.
22.18: Ano atinu tanuku na nanie akanupu anam hanaie, reiso mka urui iake osi sio pusiso mai tuniai reini tau pusu mea upu momou.’ ”
22.19: Taa san rei oyo, onunso poe no makahaia ua rei honu. Oyo pusiso onunso poe nia Bersyeba. Abraham iruei poe rei. Nahor ne hehuka
22.20: -23 Abraham inuniki on roe Tineta Moria oyo, sio osima osiki oahata, “Kakam Nahor sahai Milka isusu ne hehuka hanaia wanu nea. Ne hehuka rei nanao mo, Ia manaonete nanai Us. Wanini nanai Bus. Samatoro Kemuel (Aram amai). Samatoro Kesed, Haso, Pildasy, Yidlaf runa ia iki muie Betuel (Ribka amai).
22.24: Nahor inana ne makahaie wain nanai Reuma tau sahai. Ia makahaie rei isusu ne hehuka hanaia ate. Ne hehuka rei nanao mo, Tebah, Haham, Tahasy runa Maakha.”

23.2: oyo imatai. Imatai mai nia Hebron mai otoe Kanaan. Abraham anoi repunokoi runa sahai reiso iatamisiki.
23.3: -11 Taa san rei oyo ihitio ieui iarihoni sahai waipo inutu rei. Ieu poe iasei tau sio Het. Sio Het rei wason orueso oasau osi umau mai kota nene mitanunue. Iahata, “Wea amau. Au reini mo, au rakane wani urueku mai mo niane reini oi. Reiso uainisi arihonimo, na oahen mo tihu otoe isa osiki. Tihu otoe wani nene hatu nohue na uaunutu sahaku tanui.” Oahata, “Upu. Ami anoo ata Anahatana inoo ano mo, ano mainae. Reiso aunutu saham mai ami man hatu nohue wani iake mainae. Ia isa arihoni ami reini pusima mo, asahunuti ma hatu nohue arihonia tewa na aunutu saham.” Oyo Abraham ihitio irike tune iakapuni sio Het rei aio. Iahata, “Wea amau. Uainisi arihonimo. Sani mo maue na uaunutu sahaku mai rei, reiso oasau osi Efron, Sohor anai hanaie rei. Oasau osiki na iahen ne tihu otoe wani nene hatu nohue osiki. Ne hatu nohue rei nanae Makhpela wani haineke ne nisi nusue. Oasau osiki na iaheniki osiku na usenui osiki. Usenui samatoro uaunutu we sio matana mai mo otoe reini oi.” Abraham waimo iainisi arihoniso rei, ne Efron, ia Het rei wain ne tihu otoe rei tutui oi. Irue ikata sio Het rei pusiso oi. Reiso iahata, “Tewa upu. Hatu nohue runa nisi rei mka uruiki osia san rei man. Uruire osia mai we mansiau uao anoa. Uruire na aunutu me sio matana tanui.”
23.12: Abraham iatinu san rei irike tune isopa kokuro pusiso.
23.13: Irike tune samatoro iasau osi Efron. Iahata, “Efron. Atinu tanuku ee. Au, mka usenu me nisi runa me hatu nohue rei. Uainisi arihonia na anana kepen raini tau nene hunonia. Na uaunutu sahaku tanui.” Uaso oanamana rei, sio Het pusiso wason oru-rueso oatinu no anamanae rei.
23.14: Abraham nanie isenure ne Efron iahata,
23.15: “Upu. Uainisi arihonia. Tuamane wani poe hatu nohue runa nisi rei hunonie hasae perak inata utun ate. Uata ioi umau tau neta, reiso uhete hunonie mainae tewa. Aunutu saham poe hatu nohue reipo.”
23.16: Iahata, “Iake. Mka usenure.” Reiso masike ihete hunonie mainae san rei iae, iheu perak waron Efron iasau runare, areimo perak inata utun ate. Iheure pusu sio manahenia. Isenure osi Efron mo, sio Het pusiso wason ono-noo.
23.17: Isenure nea oyo, Efron ne tuamane wani poe Makhpela poe Mamre on ria hae rei osi Abraham. Nisi runa hatu nohue runa aiu poe nisi rei pusire osiki.
23.18: Sio Het pusiso wason oru-rueso poe kota nene mitanunue rei onoo ata tuamane rei osi Abraham nea.
23.19: Taa san rei oyo, Abraham iautotu sahai ieu iaunutui pan hatu nohue rei. Hatu nohue wani pan Makhpela pan otoe Kanaan.
23.20: Reiso nisi runa hatu nohue rei osi Abraham nea na iaunutu ne sio matana tanui.

24.1: Abraham ikore-korei iamtuai nea. Yahweh irui iake osiki pusu sae man.
24.2: Nene taue isa iasau osi ne ia makahaie wain ia manaonete arihoni ne sio makahaia pusiso utuso. Ia makahaie wain isaka ne numa hutae pusiki rei. Abraham iahata, “Mai na uata isopa mtinte reiso mai na akahuu karaku pusu re monne.
24.3: Isopa mtinte, Yahweh Anahatana inoo. Ia mo, Anahatana wain irime nante na tuamane. Asopa ata mka apenea anina ia pina isa osi anaku hanaie Isak mai otoe Kanaan reini.
24.4: Kahurae aeua pan we niane na anina ia pina hehuke isa arihoni ruaku we ipane taue osi anaku hanaie.”
24.5: Iahata, “Upu. Sani ia iki pina hehuke rei ipenei ieui iarihoni ne mansia mainaya na ieu ikataku mai rei mo, kahurae urori Isak suru pan?”
24.6: Ne iahata, “Pene! Pene arori anaku suru pan.
24.7: Yahweh Anahatana wain irime nante runa tuamane iaisosiku uhokaku arihoni amaku ne numa nea. Reiso uhokaku arihoni we mansiau runa we niane nea. Anahatana itotoe osiku. Iahata mka irui tuamana raini osi wea upu momou. Anahatana mka iaisosi ne masisosie on roe noiyaha ihokai pan naone na iakahaia. Iakahaia na anina ia iki pina hehuke isa osi anaku hanaie.
24.8: Ne sani ia iki pina hehuke rei ipenei ieu ikataya mai rei, areimo mamsopae wani uata isopai reini, mka eresupua tewa. Masike sapan iae, pene arori anaku rei suru pan!”
24.9: Sani rei oyo ia makahaie rei iaunutu hanai atue poe upui Abraham karai pusu no monne, samatoro isopa sani upui iaisosiki rei.
24.10: Isopa pusi oyo, inana upui ne unta hata hutusa. (Unta mo, makapana wani nene totu unie nene pupua sonota.) Irori unta rai runa upui ne apia waron iaka umau sani api hunahana. Iapusaare roe unta nene totu unia na rarorire. Inana pusire, samatoro ihitio ieu na pan niane wani Nahor iruei tanui pan otoe Mesopotamia.
24.11: Hoka pan oyo, ikanihoo ne unta rai na raranahaso mai parike nusue mai niane muie. Tea mo, ranie manne nea. Ranie manne mo, sio pinau mai niane rei osaka oeu oripa tihu poe parike rei.
24.12: Reiso Abraham ne ia makahaie rei iainisi, “Yahweh Anahatana. Ano wani upuku Abraham iainisi iainaa runaya. Uainisi arihonia na akahaiku na usupu ia pina hehuke isa osi upuku anai hanaie. Akahai upuku Abraham na auna anai hanaie iausahai.
24.13: Au wani uhaineke parike nusue reini. Potuina tewa oi, mka sio pina hehuka mai niane reini ohokaso mai, oripa tihu.
24.14: Reiso uainisi arihonia na ia iki pina hehu seia man wain mka uainisi tihu arihoniki na uninu, reiso mka irati ne tihu na uninu. Sani irati ne tihu rei no uninu, ouo sani iahata, ‘Me unta raino mka uunare raninu oi.’ Na uanei ata ano aroma ia pina hehuke rei osi me manorine Isak. Unoo san rei, areimo mka uanei ata anom iake runa upuku Abraham.”
24.15: -16 Iainisi pusi tewasi oimo, sira tau ia iki pina hehu iake tunne isa ihokai. Ianei isoulaha tewasi. Nanai Ribka. Ia mo, Betuel anai pina. Momoi onate tau Nahor, momoi pina onate tau Milka. Nahor mo, Abraham kakai. Ihokai nanie iripa tihu poe parike rei. Iasaoa ne tihu huie. Ihokai poe oyo, iaiinu ne tihu huie rei tau tihu. Oyo on poe nanie inuniki.
24.17: Ne Abraham ne ia makahaie rei iruma na mai ihainekei. Iahata, “Ina. Akahaiku ee! Na uninu tihu noi me tihu huie reino ee.”
24.18: Iahata, “Mai, na aninu upu.” Oyo irati ne tihu rei sisaa arihoni manai. Poe oyo, iuna ia onate rei ininu.
